We lost my mother-in-law recently, probably at the worst time, having a pandemic in progress and losing another very close member of our family just months before, and with another hanging on needing round the clock care.  I was the personal representative per her Will, and had done these duties before years ago with my dad. But still, so many questions. Now, while Mom had worked hard to have all of her affairs in order, and while most of her assets were conveyed via other means (enhanced life estate on house, POD for accounts, separate writing to go with the Will, etc), there was still work to do under Florida Law and a timeline in which to do it. Not to mention, with all my family and I had been going through, it was difficult to sort out while trying to keep everything else going as well as possible. Of course, all the running around that could be required in the middle of pandemic only adds to the stress and aggravation.  So I called Bivins and Hemenway, and one of the partners, attorney John Hemenway, agreed to take care of things for me. We had a fairly straightforward consult and John sized up what needed to happen, and how to best proceed.  He was up front with fees and a roundabout stimate based on experience. Between he and his paralegal (Erin), within just a couple of months we had all the filings with the courts done properly, and the judge's orders back, and in my case, a Summary Administration complete. I never had to worry about a thing other providing info up front and signing documents along the way. I had to visit the office but one time, and that was drop initial original documents off. All other business was done via email, phone, electronically etc. So I'm pleased with the results I got from this law firm, and highly recommend this one.  The service they provided was worth every penny. Advice: whoever you choose, start planning early, and if it is your Estate, I suggest you put some cash aside so your loved one handling your affairs can get professional legal counsel and ease their burden. If you are the personal representative, I suggest save yourself some worry and call an attorney like John Hemenway as soon as possible. I will update my own affairs again in a few years, and will use Bivens & Hemenway.  Thanks John and Erin!

John Hemenway and his Staff are wonderful. Imagine a law firm who promptly returns emails and calls, does what they say, is competent and always professional and who doesn’t overcharge. That is them. Do not hesitate to hire them.

I kept waiting for her to actually fight for me, but it felt like she was more aligned with the prosecution than with me.

Turns out, she is a former prosecutor—and it shows. There was no real defense strategy, no urgency, and no genuine advocacy. If you’re looking for someone to actually have your back and defend your name, this is not the attorney for you.

I would like to take a moment to acknowledge the outstanding service I received from my attorney, Mary Beth Corn. She was a true professional—easy to work with, strategic, and highly effective. After receiving divorce papers, I searched online for an attorney and read countless reviews.  Attorney Mary Beth Corn's reviews stood out far above all the others so I decided to give her office a call.  The consultation call came without delay.  I was very nervous.  Of course, legal matters can be stressful and overwhelming as I felt like an underdog with very little chance of getting a fair outcome.  During the consultation, she answered all my questions calmly and knowledgably, easing my apprehension and adding a level of trust that I hadn't expected.  From that moment, I knew I needed her on my side.  Her fees were reasonable and she outlined a plan of action which avoided any additional fees.  Her level of Knowledge and expertise was apparent from the beginning.  If anyone can be tough and aggressive and also honest, caring and reassuring, Mary Beth Corn is that person.  She is the total package!  With her help, I was able to reach a settlement that exceeded the expectation I had during our initial consultation.  This has truly changed my life!  I am forever grateful for finding her and the help that she gave me.

I also want to give thanks for her assistant, Teresa, who always responded in a timely manner to my emails and phone calls.  Teresa was continually reassuring me, "You Got This" and "You Can Do It".  She was absolutely right!  I got through this and I did it with the help of an awesome legal team.  I highly recommend the law firm of Mary Beth Corn to anyone seeking family law services.

I had a very difficult case from the start. As a father, I was trying to file a supplemental petition for majority custody of our daughter. Mary Beth was straight with me from our first consultation, that supplemental petitions are extremely hard to win and without good evidence she didn't want to waste my time or money. Long story short she took the case. After a long battle of nearly two years the case was settled and I now have majority custody. Nicholle and Mary Beth have both been extremely responsive throughout the entire process. They always got back to me the same day and they always let me know if they were taking time off. This is almost unheard of from most other attorneys. I would definitely retain Mary Beth again if I ever needed legal representation in the future.

Every hearing, I was fully aware of the time and location.  What impressed me about Mary Beth Corn is her professionalism, attention to detail, family-oriented environment, candid attitude, and well-knowledgeable with the LAW.

Recently, this year have been able to enjoy my timeshare experience on a FULL-TIME basis, though my children and I have a lot of catching up. I couldn’t be any happier of this outcome 😊. With that being said, what could I say about MBC’s character, besides SHE IS A TRAILBLAZER!

reviews.text:
Our Condo Association normally runs pretty well. In April we had a three person board, which is a lower  number than normal.
The new president was focused on an expensive project that she wanted. Things were being neglected, mismanaged, and, in my opinion, misrepresented.

In late July, the new president resigned upon recall. Another resigned and the third resigned effective the next meeting.
Our situation was somewhat chaotic and precarious with respect to an unpopular preliminary contract, neglect of equipment, and an orderly transition of leadership.

The partner of the condo law firm who was representing our association was nonresponsive to our homeowner interests, and I believe, unaware of our circumstances.

My neighbor knew Tiffany Grant from some work at other associations. Tiffany represented a small group of homeowners from our Association to our condo law firm. Interestingly, our condo was assigned to another attorney at the firm.

Tiffany addressed all of our issues to the condo law firm – the contract, equipment neglect and the orderly transition to new leadership. Everything came into place.

Thank You Tiffany!

I recommend Tiffany whether you are an individual, a business entity or a Homeowner Association Board.

I can’t say enough good things about Pilka, Adams & Reed. Dan Pilka has been representing me in an uphill battle with my HOA, and from the moment he and his associate, Tiffany Grant, got involved, everything changed.

I was originally told by an attorney that my case would be  difficult to fight. But Dan and Tiffany’s knowledge of Florida’s new HOA laws is unmatched — truly beyond anyone I’ve ever met. From day one, they had a clear, solid plan and uncovered multiple issues I didn’t even know to ask about.

One of the hardest parts of dealing with legal matters is the stress and sleepless nights when you don’t know what’s coming next. Dan and Tiffany eliminated that worry completely. I have 100% confidence that they are fully committed to fighting for me.

If you are dealing with an HOA dispute — or if you’re an HOA in need of a knowledgeable, trustworthy firm — I cannot recommend Pilka, Adams & Reed highly enough.

reviews.text:
DON’T waste your $ for HOA legal service here. We paid thousands. He gave advice multiple times that violated the Fla Statutes and our Governing Documents. I made 2 complaints to the Fla Bar. He charged to read the Bar complaint.
He worked with directors that hired him, one director is a felon. Wouldnt respond to anybody else.
Not in the interest and wellbeing of the 1000 residents that paid his $$
He recorded docs that arent supposed to be recorded. And charged for other advice he never answered.
Mediations? Were dismal.
Dont use lawyers that dabble in things they know nothing about. Only use HOA and Condo attorneys that are Certified by the Fla Bar in Condo and Planned Development Law.
Dont go to a proctologist if you have heart trouble.

Pilka will answer a bad review but refuses to answer Directors emails for 3 years. I am the client. I paid his bills. And I am the Director on the Board of Directors. This association is 1000+ people that have to pay for a attorney, Not just the president and 3 directors he works with. I fought all of them because they refused to comply with our Governing Documents and the Fla HOA Statutes.  Get Certified Condo and HOA attorneys.
reviews.ownerResponse: Mr. Barnett, we appreciate you taking time to leave a review. Since you are not a client of our firm and we did not represent you with any of your HOA issues, we cannot comment as to your content. However, we have had the pleasure of representing your Association and appreciate their hard work in trying to oversee your community in a manner that upholds Florida law and Statutes. Perhaps if you have any further issues, you could talk directly to your HOA Board of Directors.

reviews.text: A huge waste of time and money.  Mr. Pilka must think a lot of himself.  He charged me a $200.00 consultation fee.  That was fine and I agreed to that before going to see him.  However he did not help me in anyway.  All he did was tell me how much his retainer and hourly fee would be.  He could have told me that on the phone and not waste my time.  My advise is find an attorney that is not just money hungry.
reviews.ownerResponse: At Pilka, Adams & Reed, we strive to keep our clients and potential clients satisfied. reviews.text:
Very professional and courteous.
This firm was hired by the community management that mishandled the notification of pending debt for a recently installed water meter due to a wrong address assigned to the invoices under my name for a townhouse I own (which is currently occupied by a tenant). The community management decided to hire a lawyer (Pilka Adams & Reed) instead of sending me the invoices to my address (even though all other communications from this community management have been received without any problems for the past ten years) .
This firm (Pilka Adams & Reed) helped me navigate and resolved this issue in a timely manner.
Christine C. was very gracious and responsive when answering my questions.
I am very grateful for all the help I received when dealing with this problem.
it is always a pleasure to work with people that, while fulfilling their commitments to the party that has hired them, have the willingness to listen to your concerns and to make the effort to address them.

Carla O.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for taking the time to write this wonderful review. We are happy the matter is resolved. Your comments reaffirm the hard work we put in every day. We will pass along your kind words to Christine. Thanks for sharing your experience with us.

We represent the Association and its legal needs. We proceed as instructed in a diligent and thorough fashion. If you dispute the Association’s position, please contact us to explain why you believe the Association is in error and we will address it with our client.

reviews.text: My family lost our mother in July. It was unexpected and very hard. One of my sisters and I had been made personal representatives for our mothers trust. I live out of state and my sister lives 3 hours from Lakeland. We went for a consult with an attorney in Lakeland and he only added to our stress with arrogance and pure disregard to what we were going through. Our mother in her wisdom had used an attorney that no longer practiced but had transferred his clients to Mr. Reed. We met with Mr. Reed and his assistant Angela Rose. We were treated with the utmost respect and  they truly were compassionate and very professional.  Any questions we have had they have answered. They have been knowledgeable and caring. I would recommend them to everyone!  Andree Green
reviews.ownerResponse: We are sorry for your loss.  We are honored to provide personal and quality representation during this difficult time.

In the meantime, the insurance company indicated its intention to pay, which I informed them about, but they did not take this into account either, instead of negotiating and communicating, they started enforcement proceedings against me.

reviews.text:
Ok now its my turn to tell the story here. First of all, don't try to say that what my father wrote wasn't true. it was true to a T. I  was told by my son's mother that I was not going to see my son again. I asked for literally 15 minutes of someone's time between the day we spoke and the end of the week. I only needed one piece of advice. That was refused to me until you received your payment. You can say that it wasn't about the retainer but that is not at all what I was told. I will paraphrase but it went something along the lines of until we get the money we cant help you and we are too busy for a 15 minute phone call anyway. The thought of me not being able to see my son and being worth 15 minutes of sometime admittedly got to me. Therefore I did say that if in this dire situation (to me) I can't ask for 15 minutes of your time between now and the weekend then I will need to find someone who can.

I did ask her to politely delete the records which she responded that she would. But lets not pretend for a second that deleting those files really mattered. They were electronic and could easily be resent within minutes. I apologized within hours for seeming impatient and that I had alot going on. Not just the fear of not seeing my son, which now we are going on 17 days, but also alot at work. (Thankfully someone was able to give me not only 15 minutes, but 30 minutes of their time on the very first phone call and now we are officially in the legal process).

But nonetheless the bottom line here is whether it is true or not perception is reality. Now I was told specifically that they had added clients within one business day in which I am almost certain your firm wasn't even open. That is what bothered us the most. If she meant to say you acquired a trial then that is what should have been said, but we are still talking about less than a business day for you all to suddenly be unavailable. I apologized multiple times for something that wasn't even that big of a deal in the first place.

In terms of the litigation and it seeming difficult. What does that say about your firm? That its too much? That you can only handle the easy cases? My father respectively asked for a phone response on 2- 3 occasions and was told by other co-workers at your company that she was unavailable but yet within minutes of his phone call I receive a phone call which I didn't answer and there was a lengthy voicemail. I followed that up with a phone call back to her in which we talked for a good  5-10 minutes and yet again the truth wasn't really spoken it was just polite but condescending. Saying that she was not allowed to speak to my dad and only me because I am a client. First of all I was never a client, and secondly I signed off on all communication being available to run through my father.

The bottom line is this. She got offended by something very small and you all would not accept my genuine apologies and also would not give my father the decency of a returned phone call until he posted his review. No one is saying you all aren't good attorneys. I am sure you are. And that is why we wanted to go with you in the first place. But this seemed petty and unprofessional. I stand by my father's review completely as I was the one who was involved in every part of the communication between our parties.

You all can be great attorneys and even great people but the way this particular situation was handled I think we all can agree was not the correct way. Even if all you say is true and within one business everything changed, did a 180, your firm got too busy and you couldn't take us on then at least return his call. You had time to return mine. I'll take my piece of all this and it would be nice if you all did too. But please don't try to pretend that what we are saying isn't true and that isn't how it happened because it is. It's the full truth, nothing more, nothing less. No one is saying your firm is bad, obviously we wanted to go with you, but the way this situation was handled was not right.

Thank you,
reviews.ownerResponse:
Matthew, Lynette is the attorney who owns our firm and she is the one who made the decision after you emailed us that you did not want us to represent you and said that it was just as well as we have a heavy caseload anyway. She said it is better that we do not take on any new cases at this time especially as your case was turning out to be contentious. Additionally, we found out the next day that Monica was scheduled for trial. We only have so many legal staff and it is important to us that we limit our clients so that we can provide each of them with excellent representation.

I really do apologize to you and your father for any misunderstandings. And I do not dispute that your father is a respected professional business person who loves his son! I did not speak to him for privacy reasons and I called you immediately when I got his message. Again, I do apologize for any frustration I have caused you or your father.

We wish you nothing but the best with the outcome of your custody action.

Sincerely,
Cindy

reviews.text: Janelle Miller is simply masterful at her profession. I found this law firm for a friend months ago and decided to utilize them for myself due to their ratings with Martindale-Hubbell and AVVO. I called and spoke with a woman. Later in the day I was provided with an intake link by Elimer. Three days later I followed up with an email stating how I completed the intake and also received a Notice of Right to Sue. I called the next day and Elimer said he couldn't find my intake. I spelled my name and he had it written down wrong so I spelled it again. He put me on hold for a time saying he was going to speak with the lawyer to see if he was available for the consultation. He said that he would be available at 2:30p or 3:00p. So I told him 2:30p would work. It is currently 3:10p and there's been no response or call. I do believe there is a specific selection process due to the reviews left on here, that is simply a belief. My recommendation is to contact as many law firms possible and not be reliant on just one. Best of luck to you all.

Update: I am just seeing the law office's response to my review on 10/10/2025. Allow me to provide an accurate response. On 08/22 I completed the intake. On 08/25 I followed up with an email stating that I completed the intake and was hoping to book a consultation. On 08/26 I called the law office at 11:35a EST and the duration of the call lasted 17 mins and 3 seconds. I wrote the review above on 09/02. And did NOT receive a response via email or phone at all from Lee Law until 09/24. I have screenshots of all communication and lack thereof.
As previously stated, call as many law firms as possible to find the best representation for you instead of relying on just one.

Hello:

I am happy we were able to provide you with a free consultation where I was able to ask and answer many questions. I understand there are some law firms that charge for consultations, so I am proud I was able to provide you with that service for free. I understand you are disappointed, but tax law is not my speciality.

You see, we are not a tax law firm. If you believe there has been tax fraud it is probably best to contact a tax professional or the proper authorities. As an employment lawyer, I am not a specialist in tax law. This would be like going to Chick-fil-A and being upset that they won’t sell you a cheeseburger. It’s not what they do

reviews.text:
My original experience with Laurie Ohall, was when I reached out for guidance for my 16y/o child on the spectrum. The school system provided parents with very basic, general information, which was overwhelming in a seminar setting, & did not address the specific needs or concerns of individual families. Being told that once a student reaches the age of majority, a parent does NOT have the legal right to advocate for the child , especially in an emergency, was a very scary, helpless feeling. I am so fortunate to have found Laurie's practice. She took the time to listen to our situation, & provided me with the counsel  and empathy, that enabled me to navigate the court system, where I was appointed my son's Guardian Advocacy.  I have met many parents in the same situation, who for various personal and financial hardships, have opted to assume the risks of  not having this legal protection. I can personally attest to the fact that this legal step, has saved us from many situations, where not having the GUARDIAN ADVOCACY, would have caused unimaginable problems and stress, when taking care of a child with Developmental  Disabilities. My son is now a young adult , with a parent who has the tools , ensuring he is able to be the best he can be, and has his overall  needs met.
The next important phase of our legal needs is having an Estate Plan, Will and and Special Needs Trust,  it is comforting to know, I am doing everything  to ensure my son's well being.
This firm truly goes above and beyond to give families pertinent, valuable information , to be able to make educated decisions that affect the care , well being, and peace of mind when thinking  of life issues. The newsletters are invaluable, and are an excellent source of information, and food for thought. Shout out to Neysa , who also has been amazing as a go- to for any little question I might have. I am sure there are more people on the team that I have not met,  but thank you all  for the awesome service you provided to our family.

I recently had the privilege of consulting with Laurie, an experienced estate attorney, in regards to estate planning needs for my elderly mother. The primary intent was an initial  consultation, but the efficiency and expertise exhibited by Laurie and her assistant exceeded all my expectations.
The consultation commenced with Laurie patiently listening to our concerns and requirements. She asked pertinent questions to gain a thorough understanding of my mother's personal and financial situation. Based on our conversation, she provided insights on the importance and implications of a durable power of attorney, living will, and designation of a health care surrogate. Her explanations were free of legal jargon, ensuring that my mother fully comprehended each aspect.

Within a short span, the drafts were ready for review. Laurie meticulously walked my mother through each section, ensuring she was comfortable with the stipulations. Once we expressed satisfaction, the final versions were printed. With clear guidance, my mother was able to sign, with all the appropriate formalities observed.

In just over an hour, what I anticipated might be a multi-visit process was seamlessly completed. I left Laurie's office with a profound sense of relief, secure in the knowledge that these vital components of estate planning were expertly handled.

Laurie's professionalism turned a potentially taxing process into a smooth, efficient, and educational experience. I would highly recommend Laurie to anyone in need of estate planning services.

Honest and wonderful lawer.
Amazing and professional. Very knowledgeable and understandinf. Ruby Wake took her time to listen to my concerns and created an estate plan to protect my family. Highly recommend her!

I highly recommend Wake Law! Ruby Wake and her staff will walk you through the entire process and make you feel at ease. They explain complex matters clearly and are discerning in addressing each clients unique needs. Ruby is professional, responsive, respectful, patient and extremely knowledgeable. Wake Law will exceed your expectations!

Working with Ruby and her staff was a great experience. From the moment we walked into her office, until we signed our documents, we were always treated like VIP clients. She is knowledgeable, understanding and kind. I will recommend Ruby Wake to all my friends and family.

I would absolutely recommend Mrs. Wake for her services. Not only have I been a personal client myself during the worst time of my life (COVID). She made it her mission to show up to my house and even provide a witness to accommodate me while I had was recovering from COVID. I have referred many clients to her firm and they all have raving reviews about her. Mrs. Wake is compassionate and exceeds all expectations! I would recommend her a million times over!!
Super professional attorney, I have referred many clients to Attorney Wake and they have all left satisfied !

Being based in Northern Ireland and looking support for the passing of my father in florida which was a very emotional and difficult time in my life this attorney was not supportive, was very much money oriented and no emotional support at all. Being in lock down we were not able to fly over to sort out things, which we thought Ruby would support us and make things easier but made our life's so much more difficult.
Not answering phone calls, not getting us paperwork when needed, using wrong information in our court papers causing us more money to get redone, rudeness regarding payments, making a big deal driving 6 minutes away from her office to my father's home to sort things out even though she knew what she was getting herself into when signing up to help us. We had to ring and sort most of what she was meant to do. I have never been so stressed in my life and she was no support what so ever. I would never recommend her to anyone. Go elsewhere.

Less

My family hired Attorney Ruby Wake with Wake Law for a very sensitive probate matter and I cannot speak highly enough of Ruby and her staff, they were simply phenomenal.  They were available to answer questions and handled the matter with the utmost professionalism and care!

Very personable.
Straight shooter.

Extremely knowledgeable of the law.
Extremely efficient. Excellent client interaction.
Would recommend and will return should I have other legal needs.

I knew from talking to her on the phone that we would be taken care of. She has one of those personalities that just click and can tell she is genuine. She even helped walking us out and push my grandmother's wheelchair to the car.

My husband and I just completed our estate planning with Ruby. She made the whole process light-hearted and made sure to be very clear about our options, flushed out our ideas/wants, and when we had last minute changes at the signing, she was so understanding. I would highly recommend Ruby to take care of documenting your wishes so others don't have to guess what you want. They will know!

Ruby's professional guidance and patience while helping me make some tough decisions made the process run smoother than I had thought.  You can tell she genuinely cared. She is thoughtful with her words and I appreciated that. I highly recommend Wake Law.

If I could give more than 5 stars, I would. Mr. Farren and his team, including his paralegal, Tonya, were beyond amazing. From start to finish, Mr. Farren's expertise and advise, was exactly what I was looking for. If you are looking for an amazing attorney to help with your divorce, you will not be disappointed with choosing Mr. Farren and his team!

I have relied on the counsel of Peter Farren and his team, including Tonya, who is excellent, for a number of years on an incessant and contentious divorce. Throughout a long and often challenging process, he has consistently provided clear, thoughtful guidance and strong advocacy. This has remained true through initial filings, mediations, multiple trials, and modifications involving a high conflict co-parent.
Peter has always been precise with the law, honest about expectations, and steady throughout the process. I am extremely grateful for his constant support and guidance. I would highly recommend Peter Farren to anyone navigating complex family law matters.

We recently had our trusts prepared by Justin Klatsky of Valrico Law Group, and the entire experience exceeded our expectations. Justin is incredibly thorough and took the time to ensure every detail was handled with care. It’s clear he genuinely cares about his clients and wants them to feel confident and supported throughout the process. His office is beautiful and welcoming, and his secretary, Tara, is equally wonderful—supportive, responsive, and a true asset to the team. We are so grateful for the experience and plan to continue working with Justin for our tax and business contract needs as well. If you’re looking for an attorney who combines expertise with genuine care, we can’t recommend Justin and his team highly enough.

Outstanding legal team! From start to finish, their service was exceptional. The paralegal Tonya, took time to truly listen and help clarify my needs, while the attorney, Peter Farren, clearly explained my legal options with care and insight. They are honest, trustworthy, and client-focused—with excellent communication throughout. Highly recommended!

I would highly recommend Adam Bantner to anyone in search for a criminal defense attorney. He’s knowledgeable and straightforward, and seems to care for his clients. Keeps you updated throughout the process and answers any questions.
Peter is great. He listens to everything you say and is super professional. I highly recommend Peter at Valrico Law Group.
Adam is a consummate professional that anticipate the needs of his clients and his research is second to none.

I was very impressed Attorney Peter Farren's professionalism and efficiency in handling my uncontested divorce. He was always available to answer my questions and kept me informed throughout the entire process. The coordination of everything was top-notch, and the divorce was finalized much faster than I expected. I would definitely recommend him to anyone seeking legal assistance.
Very professional and efficient. Highly recommended.

Highly recommend Peter and team. I was given such a run around when filing for a simple divorce and he was able to get everything cleared up, filed, and completed within 30 days. I cant thank him and his team enough!!

I started with a large very expensive law firm handling my divorce and got nowhere after 1 year. I switched to Valrico Law Group and Peter Farren and his team. They did a great job cleaning up the mess and wrapped it up very quickly. Very reasonably priced and very professional, if you are looking for good legal representation look no further.

I cannot thank Peter Farren and his team (Tonya & Sebrett) enough for all their help and counsel these past 8 months. When my marriage of 30 years needed to be dissolved Peter Farren was recommended to me by a friend who had used his services.  I live out of state (my ex-spouse had become a FL resident) and I had no issues working via email/phone/zoom. I interviewed 4 attorneys and am so happy I chose the Valrico Group.  They are a well-oiled machine (it seems!) and never made me suspect they were wasting my money/time or dragging things out.  Additionally, they all were super kind and easy to work with.  Obviously, in a perfect world marriages would last forever but we don't live in that world.  If you find yourself needing to close the marriage chapter (no matter how long you've been married) please reach out to Mr. Farren and his team.  You won't regret it!

Peter and his legal team are the best.  They helped me settle my divorce better and faster than the previous attorneys I hired for LESS.  His team is prompt, communicates effectively and is very experienced.  I HIGHLY recommend them all.

I highly recommend Valrico Law Group. Thank you to Peter Farren, Esq. and Tonya for all their help with my divorce. From the first meeting, I felt welcomed, informed, and in good hands.  Peter always answered my questions and kept me calm. They reassured me we would be okay. They were professional, had fast turnaround with every step, and were very efficient.  In the signed final judgement by the judge, I was very happy with the final judgement.  I can’t say thank you enough!

The worst law firm I know, Don't go for peter Farren, he is very rude and does his ways, he won't let you correct him or cheap in and adjust anything like on my case about timesharing..Very unprofessional he doesn't want to get tired he just want to force you to do his ways and just approve anything he wants like a fool...He wants your money but don't want to work well for that money. He was very rude to me after declining his ways!! Dont waste your time coz he is not ready to work for what you will agree with him...he wants to do his own ways but not as per the client.
And very controlling too.
I had the worst experience with him.

Adam Batner is a true professional and he cares personally about his clients. I highly recommend this practice and they will be my first choice should I need legal council again in the future!  You cannot go wrong with this office.

There's nothing worse when dealing with a felony charge, than facing it without good representation. My family and I went through a difficult time when I was incorrectly and wrongfully charged with a 1st degree felony offense. I met Adam Bantner through a personal recommendation, and consistently experienced him put his best effort in for me . . . whether it was a hearing for a continuance, or his knowledge of the law and legal system which seemed to always surprise the prosecution. He was always one step ahead with his preparation, comments and objections. I recall always thinking to myself that when we went into the courtroom for any reason during the 2 year process, there was a good chance we'd see success . . . because he put his heart into it. He wasn't pushy, but shared his knowledge and advise through the process. With a life sentence on the line, he was a wolf. He stood tall by my side, and we braved trial together. Being found innocent of all charges by a jury of my peers, I'm sitting here writing this review with the understanding that not only was this man the best money could retain, but I wouldn't go anywhere else for the rest of my life, should I need legal council again. I highly recommend you reach out to him should you be in a frightening legal circumstance. I have peace now in my life, because of Adam Bantner's prowess as an attorney.

Mr. Wells and his staff were very professional and diligent in regards to all aspects of our relationship with Valrico Law Group.  He made it very clear from the beginning that he was always available via cell on nights and weekends if we had any questions or concerns. Any messages left were promptly returned. I would recommend Mr. Wells and his firm for any legal needs and would utilize his services again, should the need ever arise.

When my beautiful equestrian barn burned down due to a faulty meter, there was more than one party at fault. Many of the firms I interviewed were dismissive of my case and not empathetic to my plight. I interviewed Kim Wells at Valrico Law and he enthusiastically gave me hope, discussed my options, gave me a realistic expectation of the time investment and the challenges that lay before me. All in all, over nearly a three year period, communication was well above my expectations, Kim was attentive to my case and needs for information, and genuinely cared for the result that will so greatly affect my wife and I. Had I not known the difference, I would have thought I was Kim's only client he was so attentive. I truly hope that events in life would not require his services again however, in the case that I need someone to fight for me and ensure I receive the maximum amount due me under the law, I would absolutely choose Kim Wells again without hesitation. Could I do so, I would give them a six star review. I highly recommend Kim Wells to anyone who may be in need of his services.
Lovely office and very courteous staff

My husband and I hired Attorney Mara Shaughnessy to handle our estate planning ( Will/Trust ) to include a special needs trust. We are so happy we did. She is professional, knowledgeable and yet personable. Both her and her staff are patient, kind and they truly listen to your needs and goals. We are very confident with her expertises. She has exceeded our expectations each time and we will continue to use her for our legal needs. We highly recommend her.

I hired Mara Shaughnessy to handle an adult guardianship process and am so glad I did. She and her amazing secretary, Kelly, made the experience as smooth as possible. Her office was very responsive and patient throughout all the proceedings. They never hesitated to answer my questions or get things filed on time. I highly recommend retaining Mara's services.

My mother n law hired Myra to do a probate for her. She was very slow to achieve any results. Communicated more with her secretary than her. Had to make appointments just to talk to her on the phone. It took her 10 months to say she can't do no more for her because a will turned up. Talk about a let down. I think a refund is due, cause nothing got accomplished.

We knew that finding an attorney to advocate and provide Second Parent Adoption Services was going to be hard and not as common. We went through four different lawyers before finally finding Mara and her law firm. My partner and I were at ease throughout the whole process even when we faced a couple of setbacks due to the Judge not being familiar with Second Parent Adoption, Mara and Tylinh gave us reassurance that everything will be fine and advocated for us in a professional manner. Once the adoption order was finalized, they immediately notified us. We are so pleased with their service, support and can't thank them enough. Due to their amazing work, I'm legally the second parent of my son and our family is legally complete.

If you're in need of Second Parent Adoption, I highly recommend Mara and her law firm!

Excellent Lawyer and law firm !
They took the time to truly listen to all of our concerns and offered clear, honest guidance every step of the way.

What stood out most was their responsiveness and attention to detail. We never felt like just another case—they treated us with genuine care and worked tirelessly to ensure the best possible outcome. Communication was always prompt, and they made complex legal matters easy to understand!

Mara is awesome ! Very down to earth while still being the utmost professional!

The best hands down! Very professional, courteous and most importantly, she actually cares. Mara and the staff. I found out about my son, 6 weeks after he was born. And he has always been with me but I wasn't on the birth certificate. So, I was having little problems here and there with his mother using it against me, and having problems with her doing what's best for our son. Failing school is not an option. Shaughnessy Law with above and beyond to get me full custody of my son and got his last name changed at the age of nine! I'm so happy and grateful and extremely blessed for this particular law firm in general. I love my kids dearly and how she went about my case. I felt she loved my kid as well. Thank you guys so much!!! God bless!
2 thumbs up!!!

reviews.text:
If I could leave negative stars I would.  Worst "lawyer" ever.  DO NOT USE HER SERVICES SHES INCOMPETENT.  In the beginning, before paying the retainer Mara was responsive and reassured me that everything would be fine, she would handle it all and make sure I wasn't taken advantage of.  I paid the retainer feeling relieved that someone would lead me through these legal proceedings and I wouldn't get taken advantage of.  Fast forward 8 months later, she hadn't responded to the requests from opposing counsel, had delayed so much that opposing counsel filed a motion for maximum discovery.  Resulting in 2 years of financial discovery instead of 2 months.  Of course, I didn't know this until 2 days before it was due to the court.  Now I had to scramble to obtain, redact non applicable information myself and scan it to her office.
Mara shows up in court with a dead laptop, dead phone and none of the information for my case.  We had to rely on the opposing counsel to calculate child support and relay that information to the judge.  Mara's only words to me were "that sounds about right".
Important details that will cost me 10s of 1000's in the future were left out of my final judgement.  After months of requesting invoices for billed hours against my fully paid retainer nothing has been sent.  She never answers calls or returns voicemails.  She is completely unorganized, unresponsive, unprofessional and lacks any work ethic.  I'm currently working to have her removed from the legal aide reference sheet at my office because no one should have to deal with this level of incompetence when going through an already difficult legal process.  It baffles me how she could still be in business after being such an embarrassment to her profession.
reviews.ownerResponse: Hi R Douglass, I appreciate your feedback and I'm sorry to hear about your experience. We take client satisfaction seriously, and I apologize for any inconvenience caused during your legal proceedings. Your concerns will be thoroughly reviewed to address the issues you've raised. We strive to improve our services and appreciate your input. If you have any specific details or would like to discuss this further, please feel free to contact our office directly.

reviews.text: Excellent Law Firm!  In 2017 I got married and it ended very quickly. Mara and her team helped me with an annulment. Something very hard to do in the state of Florida.  The motions went back and forth, she handled and answered everyone of them! In the end, she argued my case, presented the evidence to the judge and was granted the annulment in my favor. I must say, after 2 previous marriages and two divorces she worked hard she worked harder than both of those other attorneys combined. Constant contact day or night to. Answer questions and or give status updates too. No additional fees were ever charged and completed everything for the agreed price of the retainer. I could have never asked for a better attorney 😊
reviews.ownerResponse: Hi Charles, thank you for sharing your experience! Our law firm takes pride in navigating complex cases, like annulments in Florida, with dedication and expertise. We're thrilled to have provided constant support, and clear communication, and delivered successful results without any unexpected fees. If you ever need legal assistance again, we're here to help!

reviews.text: Ms  Shaughnessy  was very understanding and attentive to my needs. I can't thank her enough for helping me get though that chapter of my life. I would highly recommend her. ☺️
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for sharing your experience with our law firm. We're thrilled to hear that Ms. Shaughnessy, our dedicated family law attorney, provided such understanding and attentive service during such a crucial chapter of your life. reviews.text: To start, I’d like to say thank you Mara and Tylinh for EVERYTHING! What an amazing team. Mara was very responsive and she answered all my questions I had. Throughout the process, Mara made sure I was always prepared for court and was there for me when I needed her. During this process Mara made me feel like family, I was comfortable with talking with her about anything and I could even cry to her and she was always there for me! reviews.text: Never use this firm.  I’ve called multiple times regarding follow up on an Issue they supposedly said they will help me with. I get the run around from the lady who answers the phone.  Apparently they do not like helping the little man.

reviews.text:
I contacted this lawyer for immediate help concerning a legal matter when I initially called I was given a wait time for follow up due to Mara Shaughnessy vacation at the time. I patiently waited until I received call back time passed and my appt was now here so I called the office for my consultation and immediately I was basically told my appt was entered for another time slot that has since past I’m a little puzzled at this feedback but the receptionist assured me she’ll have Ms. Shaughnessy call me back within no time I received a call back while the legal representative took her lunch me not thinking much at the time “I’m just glad to be able to finally report my concerns” during the entire conversation I felt rushed which okay” I understand she’s on lunch but I rather received a call back if I wasn’t going to be truly heard* we finish our conversation I’m told what the next steps would be and ever since that day I have not heard ONE THING back from this legal aid and truly felt I was put off like I didn’t go out my way to get her assistance. Now, me I’m a logical person if MARA SHAUGHNESSY could’ve called back and gave genuine advice or feedback we may not be here but unfortunately she did NOTHING and I’m glad I’m such amazing person that don’t give up on myself and always place myself in a position to SUCCEED that her legal responsibilities played no effect on my case and I was able to actively retain, complete and resolve my own issues!

Please do better as a whole !!

reviews.text: I am very happy I called Sweat Law Firm for my divorce. They are very professional and friendly. They did all the work and my divorce was final very quickly. I recommend anyone to call Sweat Law Firm with any issues you may have. Thank you Sweat Law Firm for my new beginning.

Mrs. Shiela  Sweat went above and beyond to help me with signing important paperwork. She was incredibly kind, professional, and responsive, and she made a stressful situation feel much easier. I told her I was not only impoverished by this case but I needed help at least getting my mother's airloms, my grandfather's ww2 flag over his casket, and even getting what the little  I was given in divorce that my ex wife would not give me . Hire at your own risk , she has no empathy for you only her pocket .She promised me to get me justice for my case she explained through her partner Ms Texter as my other lawyer made tons of mistakes then wanted 1200 more and when I couldn't pay she dropped me, not with a call but a lousy email. I dont know how these lawyers sleep at night  devastating lives for money. I literally had to give her account, routing number to pay her. I got calls everytime card didn't work but not 1 bit of help in this case. I will be filing with the bar ,but we all know  she will get away with helping destroy my life ,as im now living in squalor, broke and hungry . 4000 dollars then wanted another 1200  when I couldn't afford it she dropped me
Stealing 4000 dollars and 0 work ,im worse off now then when I hired her. I pray she gets in life exactly what she deserves.  She's a heartless woman that took advantage of someone poor ,that begged for her help and got a bunch of promises and 0 return . How evil must you be to take money from a poor client begging for your help,knowing you weren't gonna do anything for him. Promised me id get justice ,instead I got robbed again .

reviews.text:
I do not recommend Sweat Law Firm based on my personal experience. Communication was extremely poor, responses were delayed or nonexistent, and there was a consistent lack of professionalism throughout my case. I was billed even for basic, routine communication, and much of that communication did not result in meaningful progress on my case.

As far as the paralegal involvement goes, I honestly have no words. The level of professionalism and support I experienced was extremely disappointing.

I was also billed for work that was never completed or never clearly explained, which caused unnecessary stress and financial strain. I strongly advise anyone considering this firm to carefully review all billing statements, ask detailed questions in writing, and research any complaints filed with the Florida Bar before signing anything. Please be aware when an attorney answers every single complaint against her office, but all the complaints seem to be similar. Those are indeed red flags.

Legal representation should involve transparency, accountability, and clear communication—none of which were consistently provided in my experience.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Kimbria,

Thank you for sharing your feedback. We are sorry to hear that your experience did not align with your expectations.

At Sweat Law, we take professionalism, ethics, and transparency very seriously. We have never been disciplined by the Florida Bar, and we remain committed to operating in full compliance with all ethical and professional standards governing the practice of law.

While we cannot discuss the specifics of your case in a public forum due to confidentiality obligations, we can note generally that our firm offers both full representation and limited-scope services. In some instances, misunderstandings arise when a limited-scope engagement is retained, but expectations extend beyond what was agreed upon. For example, proceeding directly to trial requires full representation, extensive preparation, and significant resources, and it is not reasonable or feasible under a limited-scope arrangement with a minimal initial fee.

Our firm is transparent about these limitations from the outset to ensure clients can make informed decisions about their representation. Our scope of representation, billing practices, and communication expectations are clearly outlined in our retainer agreement and are regularly communicated to our clients throughout the representation. All billing is tied to work performed in accordance with those agreed-upon terms.

We understand that legal matters are often stressful, and misunderstandings can occur when expectations differ. We appreciate feedback such as this, as it allows us to continually evaluate and improve our processes.

We wish you the best moving forward.

Sincerely,

Shiela Sweat, and the Sweat Law Team

reviews.text:
I would like to take this time to show my appreciation for Shiela Sweat and the entire Sweat Law staff. My case is still ongoing; however, I wanted to express my gratitude for the support I’ve received thus far. Family law matters are never easy, and you truly need an attorney who is empathetic, compassionate, and trustworthy. From my experience, Shiela Sweat is all of these things and more.

As a single mom of three, the financial burden of a family law case can be overwhelming. Shiela Sweat understood this and was incredibly understanding and willing to work with me, which meant more than she could ever know. Any time I had a concern and brought it to her attention, it was addressed and resolved immediately. Her dedication and responsiveness have made a difficult situation much easier to navigate.

Once my case is complete, I plan to come back and update this review to reflect my full experience with Sweat Law.

Thank you, Shiela & Sweat Law Team!

Loved working with Sweat Law and the whole firm! They were very professional, knowledgeable, and able to answer all my questions. Anita was also very helpful and I would recommend this firm to anyone who needs assistance!

Sweat Law provides outstanding legal services in the area of family law. Attorney Abraham embodies the firm’s commitment to excellence, combining deep legal knowledge with compassion, professionalism, and integrity.I highly recommend Sweat Law to anyone seeking experienced, compassionate, and results-driven representation in family law matters.
Great service, would recommend to any family looking for help

I hired Sheila Sweat on June 30, 2025, for a motion for financial relief. I did not receive the documents to sign until Aug 5, 2025. 5 weeks later.  In which, I had to call in to remind them to send them.
My experience has been unbelievable to say the least
Unprofessional conduct and mismanagement
Neglect of representation
Neglect of duty
Conflict of interest
Closed during a scheduled appointment then redirected to a third party to drop off legal confidential documents.
Unethical and excessive billing practices. High hourly rates for minimal work. Sheila Sweats firm charged $2,000 retainer on phone calls and sending documents. She is now demanding $3,500 before filing documents and preceding with the case. Kind of ironic, since my reasons for hiring her were for financial stress and burdens.
There have been several reviews claiming a similar experience.
It would be wise to do thorough research before hiring this firm.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Ms. Lavin, Thank you for taking the time to share your experience. I’m truly sorry to hear that your time working with our firm did not meet your expectations. We take feedback seriously, as it helps us continue improving the way we serve our clients.

For clarity, you did not retain our office to prepare any Motions. You retained us to pursue an initial family law case. Your documents were prepared shortly after you retained. We scheduled multiple appointments with you to sign them in person, per your request, and unfortunately you were a no call no show twice, which contributed to the delay. Additionally, there has never been a conflict of interest in any part of our representation. Further, the hourly rate that we charge is on the lower end of industry standards, and we structure our hourly rate on the low end to remain an affordable option to our clients. Our goal is always to be as flexible and supportive as possible, especially when clients are experiencing financial strain. We often offer payment plans to help reduce the upfront burden of legal costs, something not many firms are able to do. However, when payments on a retainer plan are delayed or missed, it can unfortunately cause delays in case preparation and filing, as outlined in our retainer agreement.

As for your concern about leaving financial documents with a third party, the individual you mentioned is our accountant, a trusted member of our professional team who is bound by confidentiality and works closely with us to maintain proper financial handling.

We understand that legal matters can already be stressful, and we never want our clients to feel unsupported. Please don’t hesitate to reach out directly so we can review your concerns together and work toward a resolution that provides clarity and peace of mind.
Shiela and the Sweat Law Team❤️

I had attorney Shiela Sweat representing me on a very complicated case against my ex wife. My son‘s mother was determined to take my son away from me. She actually withheld him for full five months. Court processes are very complicated and take a long time. Fortunately attorney Shiela knows the system and she was able to file all the appropriate motions to get my case running. She was able to put my ex in front of a judge to be held accountable for her actions, I’m able now to see my son again.
Further down the line in my case we were able to settle in mediation, attorney Sweat got me a really good deal, basically everything that I was asking for, I got more time with my son, and I got changes on the parental plan that I was requesting. This achievement not only save me over a year of litigation but also thousands of dollars in attorneys and legal fees.
Attorney sweat was really upfront all the time and guided me through the whole process. She spoke to me directly and never sugarcoating the facts. She was very knowledgeable and skillful in court.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Orledy!! Such a kind review. Thank you for your feedback. Watching your son run up to you and give you the biggest hug at the courthouse after five long months of absence truly made my day and reminded me of why I do what I do. Priceless moments! I wish you and your family all the best!
- Shiela

reviews.text:
God bless you! Good afternoon! I'd like to share my thoughts. Why do I compare you to the Harvey Specter series on Netflix? In other words, your conscience is witness, prosecutor, and judge. Nobody wins a trial while asleep... Laziness, apathy, and negligence are actually your worst enemies. 5 lessons:
1- Appearance is important, so take care of yours.

2- Win battles even before you fight them.

3- Never raise your voice, improve your arguments.

4- Always do more than what is asked of you.

5- Don't be sleepy, have plans and goals.
Remember to focus on improving yourself, not on thinking you are the best. In the end, it's not about how many ideas you come up with, but how many you actually put into action.
The person you need to impress and surpass is yourself. People will love you for who you are, and others will hate you for the same reason. Get used to it! If someone treats you badly, there's something wrong with them, not with me. Sane people don't go around destroying other people's lives. The value of life lies in understanding that your family is priceless, that your health is true wealth, and that your time is precious.
reviews.ownerResponse: Wow!  Thank you for taking the time to write us a review.  We will definitely have to look for this series on Netflix!  Best of luck to you and your family!

Exceptional Support for Veterans

I recently found The Bulluck Veterans Disability Help Center. I can’t say enough about their outstanding service. As a 70 ‘s Vietnam-era veteran dealing with complex issues related to my VA appeals.

Sarah, a fellow veteran herself, has been my point of contact, and her positive spirit and understanding have made a significant impact. I found her to be incredibly knowledgeable, compassionate, and dedicated. She is navigating the intricacies of my case with expertise, ensuring that I have a fair chance of receiving the benefits I deserved that have been blurred by decades of time.
I feel the Help Center’s “No Recovery. No Fee Promise” underscores their commitment to veterans like me. I wish I would have found them sooner.

Tracy Johnston

reviews.text: My family and I got into a car accident where we were t-boned on the driver side by a driver who failed to yield. My wife, oldest daughter, and I all had back pain and spinal injuries. My wife received the worst pain and injuries on top of being four weeks post-partum. We were reluctant to hire any attorney, but after a week of waiting we decided to move forward. I was recommended Bulluck Law group by a co-worker, and we're glad that we followed that recommendation. The process of reconciling accidents with insurance companies is a long and arduous one. Bulluck Law Group takes that process on their shoulders and helps makes sure that you get the medical care that you need, taking the information learned about your injuries, and presenting an effective case to your insurance company to get the maximum amount out of your claim. My family and I recommend Bulluck Law Group to anyone and everyone looking for a law firm that cares, is prudent, and will make sure you're compensated properly for your injuries.

reviews.text:
If you are researching lawyers for your custody case, look no further. Enduring a custody battle is a challenging time for anyone but facing it alone can make it worse. Carl O’Hall and his assistant, Carolyn, are two of the best people I have ever met. Although I retained Carl as my lawyer, he quickly became like family during our time working on my custody case. I would like to take a moment to comment on Carolyn. I am a person who values excellent customer service over anything, and Carolyn went above and beyond, as she was always there to speak to me or address any concerns I may have had in the moment while waiting to speak with Carl. She is such a wonderful person, and I am truly happy to have met and worked with her as well. Carl has such an amazing attention to detail, with over 20 years of family law experience, he is able to provide a lot of wisdom in his advice. I went through one of the worst times imaginable in my life and Carl was there with me every step of the way. He listened to everything I wanted to accomplish and never once made me feel like it was out of reach.  He was realistic with his advice and presented reasonable and logical ways to go about accomplishing our goal. Carl is someone who will fight for you, win or lose, he will give it his all and I am proud to say that we won our case. Carl is a calm and collective person but in the court room he is aggressive with stating facts, presenting evidence and objecting to anything he can.
I could go on and on giving kind words about Carl and Carolyn, but if you are looking for representation these are the people you want in your corner. For everyone who reads this post and decides to retain another lawyer, I pray Carl is not your adversary, because if he is…good luck, you will need it lol.
reviews.ownerResponse: John, it was a distinct pleasure working with you!  You were absolutely a pleasure to help, and you did everything I could have asked to assist your case. Thank you for the amazingly kind words!

reviews.text: I had a horrible experience with this law firm since Jana Barnett was made a partner.  I have worked with many great attorneys through my divorce and custody battle but I needed to find a new one since relocating to Florida.  Despite my paperwork, payment and documents being sent, the law firm sat on my case for nearly two months.  Tina Castro treated me as if I had a contingency case, speaking down to me at every turn.  She insisted that I never turned in the documents they needed, therefore, my case was stalled.  When I showed her proof, she offered no apologies and simply said that the person I turned them into was no longer there, in a condescending tone.  Unhappy with how Tina was treating me and Janas lack of communication I reached out directly to Jana.  Jana was too busy to call me back and had Tina schedule a meeting a week out.  In an email exchange prior to the call,  Jana was quick to defend her staff, offered no apology for sitting on my case and made a comment that it was better to deal with Tina because her fee is less than hers.  Needless to say, I was shocked and asked for an accounting of my money.  I noticed that meetings were charged that never happened.  I immediately terminated my relationship with the firm and asked for my money to be returned.  It's been nearly two weeks and they still have not prioritized it.  Takeaway, you're not a priority here, they are too busy to handle your case professionally and they make no apologies for their mishaps  I will be getting in touch with the board.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Christina,
I apologize that you feel this way, however this is not an accurate representation of your experience with our firm. We have offered several opportunities for a phone call with our office, and the offer still stands. We would be happy to discuss this further if you would like to call the office. However, we are constrained by the Florida Bar rules by publicly disclosing any details surrounding your matter. Again, should you wish to contact us, we are more than willing to discuss your thoughts. We wish you luck and happiness with your family in the future either way.
-Jana & Tom

There are additional updates since I originally posted the review below five years ago. No matter - the comments remain the same. Well, almost; the exception is that Jana (the outstanding paralegal) is now an attorney. She took over my case from Tom for three separate court filings. I cannot put into words how great Jana and the team at the Law Office of Thomas Gill have been. You will not find a harder-working, responsive, knowledgeable, personable, and genuine group. In the end, it was their efforts that helped me to reach my ideal end state eventually. See below for my last review. Again, and always, my strongest recommendation.
— — — — —
I hired Mr. Gill to represent me in what I had hoped would be an amicable dissolution of a 15-year marriage. Unfortunately, that illusion was quickly shattered over the next few months. Fortunately, Mr. Gill (and his outstanding paralegal Jana) remained patient and poised through a contentious divorce. In an environment where emotion often trumps logic, Mr. Gill advised that I stay nice under all circumstances. While not always easy, this was the best course of action. Despite an extreme lack of professionalism from opposing counsel, Mr. Gill was able to guide me through the divorce process, ultimately reaching a settlement that I could live with.

reviews.text:
This firm only responds if you chase them relentlessly, and even then they waste time, shift blame, and double charge for basic work.

Extremely unprofessional experience with Attorney Jamelia Little. She wasted my time with delays, constantly shifted blame back to me, and ignored documents I had already provided as well as my questions. Conversations were unnecessarily long—whenever I raised that they had delayed my case, the call was dragged out just to shift blame. A discussion that could be resolved in 5 minutes was turned into 30 minutes of circular arguments, all to avoid accountability.

While some issues were eventually “fixed,” that only happened because I was constantly chasing the firm, monitoring every step, and asking the same questions over and over before finally getting a response. Even the one critical piece of evidence where I actually needed legal analysis was handled poorly—no opinion for weeks, then two changes of position in the final week before the deadline, forcing me to redo work and wasting time and money. They also made mistakes right before the filing deadline, creating unnecessary stress. Fees are nearly double what other attorneys charge, yet the service quality felt worse than basic.

The assistant did reply quickly, but only on simple matters; harder questions were ignored, and when real issues came up, the assistant used the same blame-shifting language as the attorney.

Attorney Jamelia Little showed all of these problems—delays, inefficiency, last-minute errors, repeated blame-shifting, and an overall “quiet quitting” style of lawyering. Her colleague, Attorney Lisa Knox (family law), showed the same issues and, in addition, manipulative behavior, false or misleading advice that cost me valuable time, and triple charging.

Because of this, the most important and technical legal issues in both of my cases have already been shifted to a newly hired divorce attorney, who is handling them far more professionally.

With all being said, I still expect Attorney Jamelia Little to fulfill the duties contracted for and to deliver competent work on the immigration side. I do not expect her to go above and beyond, but I do expect professional, accurate, and timely execution. If that standard is not met, I will have no choice but to seriously consider filing a formal complaint.

I would never recommend this firm to anyone who values clear communication, accountability, and timely handling of sensitive immigration matters.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your feedback. While we cannot comment on the specifics of any matter, we want to assure the community that our firm upholds the highest standards of professionalism, integrity, and client care. We remain committed to providing compassionate and effective legal representation to those we serve.

I hired Boohoff Law, P.A. to handle my car accident claim because my auto insurance company was poorly representing me and I was overwhelmed with all that I had to do. Furthermore Boohoff Law was highly recommended by a friend whose honesty and integrity I truly admired. Even then I had resevations, but Michelle's calm and empathetic demeanor, and clarity of how Bohooff Law helps their clients made me feel secure and in good hands. They were honest about the costs; gave ample details on how to handle my medical treatment activities and monitored them in order to keep me from over spending.
This left me more relaxed to deal with the other concens of the accident, such as cancelling warranties, etc. Boohoff Law, P.A. delivered awesome service, got me all the money that was due to me.
However, it did take a little longer than expected. But, they did offer to advance me some money, at no cost. I am grateful for their service and highly recommend Boohoff Law, P.A.

The results which the Platinum Benefits said were possible was exactly the outcome we got. I had submitted several Medicaid applications for my 85 year old mother. Each one resulted in a denial. While awaiting the decision from my last attempt, my mom fell and upon her discharge from the hospital, she was admitted to a rehabilitation facility. The facility recommended Platinum Benefit Services and said that they have suggested that company many times. We spoke to a representative of Platinum Benefit Services and after they reviewed our details, the representative felt very confident that based on the current circumstance, Medicaid would be approved. We signed the contract, paid the fee and Platinum Benefit Services took charge. They told us that it is usually a three month process and my mom was approved in 2½  months. About every two weeks, Platinum Benefit Services would provide an update and expectation concerning the application. Platinum Benefit Services was very responsive to any questions that I had and emails were answered within an impressive response time, sometimes in only minutes. Based on my personal interaction with Platinum Benefit Services, I recommend Platinum Benefit Services 100%. I appreciate Platinum Benefit Services' result and the assistance that has come from the added government services now available to my mother.

reviews.text: David and his team were very helpful and supportive in bringing my claims forward to the VA. Highly recommend.
Mr. Magann took my VA claim from 90% to 100%.  He also successfully took my Social Security claim to completion and won my case.  Would highly recommend.  Thank you to him and the team!

David Magann took my claims and I went from 30% to 100% in a year and a half. He has a friendly staff and are always ready to answer my questions then or get back to me quickly. I would recommend them to any other veteran he knows all the ins and outs for you to get what you deserve.
David Magaan’s representation was awesome, I received my 100-% p&t under his representation. I had been trying for years.

Dave and his Team are First Class, they will guide you through the VA process and support you all the way, be patient and help all you can to support them in your cause, you will be satisfied. Thanks for everything Dave and Team!!

The absolute most devastating wrongs that can be committed towards someone the Veterans Affairs has done to me. DAVID W MAGANN is correcting wrongs committed towards me for the past 19 years. He is an amazing attorney fighting for the good and right way. Highly recommended!

David Magann was a big help in getting my full veteran benefits. I tried for years, with his help it was a reality within the same year. The office was easily reachable and very professional. I've already recommended his services to my other veteran friends.

For years I dealt with the VA compensation & pension department to no avail. I was stuck in 90% compensation for 10 years. VA continued to deny my appeals for unemployability and a total pension despite my inability to work and all my back, hip and knee problems caused by an accident. I was referred to David by a veteran friend. David submitted my claim and in 2 months VA approved 100% compensation permanent & total. He continued fighting and later on l was approved unemployability. David’s office was always diligent and professional with my case. He worked efficiently 7 years. I highly recommend David. Thank you for your help.

My regret is starting this alone. I tried to do it myself . I attended  multiple appointments, dug through records to prove my disability’s existed and  impacted me daily. I was not able to reach the rating I felt correlated with my disability’s. Mr. Magann was transparent and goal focused. He asked questions and had an answer for all my inquires.He made it happen!  I highly recommend this professional.

I was referred to David by a family member and unfortunately, I did not get a positive experience myself after my initial consultation. The attorney gave me a call about 5 mins late (which is fine because things happen) and the first thing they said was "Hey, heard you got a VA problem". No apology for the tardiness and no greeting/introduction.

After continuing to receive what felt like animosity/aggression from this attorney, I politely stopped the conversation to ask if I had said or done anything to offend or upset him based on the way he was speaking to me since he made me feel like a burden and as though I may be wasting his time. Once again, no apology or acknowledgement of how he was communicating, only "I'm just trying to help". I shared the feedback towards the end of the call in case David could apply something learned to future calls but was told "good luck" followed by being hung up on abruptly. Based on this experience, you can obviously tell David could care less that I was a referred to him by someone who he helped...which says a lot about a business owner given the value of a healthy and positive referral network.

I'm not sure how folks put their trust in someone who lacks professionalism and people skills when trying to help a veteran and potentially get paid for their service. If you're reading this, I advise to take your potential business elsewhere if you value professionalism and someone who will truly look out for your best interest.
reviews.ownerResponse: NEVER a client. We only provide  a FREE frank reality based assessment. Unfortunately some may be come bitter and jaded because they feel the VA treated them poorly. We only hope veterans can find what they are seeking.

reviews.text: I was referred to David from a veteran friend who was helped by him.  I submitted my request to his office late last spring and contacts with VA personnel regarding re-evaluation within a couple of weeks.  My disability percentage was raised from 60 to 90% by September of the same year.  Other items within the claim were deferred and I just continued my normal VA medical care appointments.  Last week I got a new, final claim letter for 100%.  David's office was professional and timely in all of its communications with VA, and as I have learned, used the right language from the CFR to meet the requirements for the appeal.  Ultimately, God again has blessed us.  I would highly recommend David's company and God's blessings.  Good luck to the other veterans and thank you and your family for your service.

Mr Magann was phenomenal at helping with my case, he was on top of it and very determined to help me. He helped me understand what I could not understand and what I could not comprehend.I would recommend him to everyone, including my family.

He was recommended by a colleague who was with me in the Army when my Mental Health Issues claim was denied in 2022. From the first moment he contacted me, he began working with his team.
Today I can proudly say that he got me 100% Permanent and Total in 2024. I recommend, excellent team members, and above all I have to mention Ms. Alina Fernandez who was always there to help if you don’t speak English. THANK YOU,THANK YOU, BLESSINGS. I highly recommend, I put my trust in David W. Magann and in the end the result…. 100% PERMANENT and TOTAL.

I am extremely grateful to Mr. David W. Magann, PA and his team, especially Alyna who was very professional, patient, and helpful.

Mr. Maganns' vast knowledge about veteran disability claims was evident from the on set of our first phone conversation.  He quickly pointed out some of the benefits I was entitled to but, was not currently receiving.  He and his team went to work on my behalf immediately.
I am very pleased and grateful with the timely results of my case.

If you are a veteran seeking help with your disability claims, I, without hesitation, recommend David W. Maganns' office.

She went above and beyond to answer all my questions, kept me updated, and truly made me feel like a priority. If you’re a veteran looking for help with your disability claims, I highly recommend this office. They genuinely care about their clients and fight for the best outcomes!

I called the Top Notch Tampa Injury Attorney on behalf of my wife Lisa. After three weeks of nightmare with another personal injury firm in Tampa that brags about being the best. We were totally mislead and lack of communication was our main concern.

Our attorney took over our case and the results were incredible. Within 24 hours our issue with the repairs to our vehicle were resolved. My wife had gotten medical treated and our case settled. reviews.text: After a truly terrifying rear-end collision at the intersection of Bayshore Boulevard and Howard Avenue in South Tampa, I was left with a serious whiplash injury and a totaled car. I was completely overwhelmed and didn't know where to turn. A friend recommended Top Notch Tampa Injury Attorney, and I'm so grateful they did. Their office, located at 4713 E Hillsborough Ave, was surprisingly convenient despite my living in South Tampa, and, made it easy to reach them. From my initial consultation with Morgan, I felt like I was in good hands. They took the time to listen to my concerns, explain the complexities of Florida's no-fault insurance laws, and outline a clear plan of action. They handled everything, from dealing with the insurance company to coordinating my medical treatment at Tampa General Hospital. They kept me informed every step of the way and fought tirelessly to get me the maximum compensation I deserved for my medical bills, lost wages, and pain and suffering. They are, without a doubt, the best car accident lawyer in the South Tampa area, and I highly recommend them to anyone injured in a car accident in the Tampa area. If you are looking for a personal injury attorney near me who truly cares about their clients, call Top Notch Injury Attorney.

Eventually, I took the mindset of "I'm probably not going to get anything" so I didn't get my hopes up just to be let down. Once I got the news as to how much I would be receiving, I was initially excited, until I learned how much I still owed the hospital. Well Lao law firm was able to negotiate my hospital bills down a whopping 83%! At that point I was very excited and realized I had in fact chosen the right law firm to represent me. After signing the paperwork, I received my check very promptly. Patience is a virtue, this firm knows what they're doing, and I trust them very much. reviews.ownerResponse: Attorney's fees are impacted by client's choices, including their acts and failures to act, and not following advice of counsel.
