Additionally, we strongly encourage people to seek the advice of an attorney well versed in estate planning when preparing their own estate plans so they can prevent costs to their heirs, such as these, in the future.

reviews.text: The first time I pursued Disability, I thought I could do it myself,  and failed.  The second time, I used a huge, over advertised law firm, could never speak with an attorney, and failed.  The third time, the only way I could move forward was to have a knowledgeable, proficient, professional attorney navigate the Disability process representing me.  One that did not employ a secretary, law student, or paralegal, and who would do the work personally.  One that would physically meet with me, review all of my documentation, and answer all of my questions.  One that would not require payment unless Disability was obtained.  I met with Brendan, we reviewed all of my documentation, and he answered all of my questions.  He knew what was required to support an OTR, (On the Record) document, and how to present it.  Using my documentation, he produced a professional, qualitative, and quantitative OTR.   It was everything a law judge would need to review my case.  In my case, Brendan suggested sending it to the law judge prior to requesting a court date.  The judge ruled within two weeks and approved Disability.  Brendan did an amazing job.  I would highly recommend him to anyone pursuing Disability.  I only wish that I had contacted him from the beginning!

reviews.text: I am a 69 yrs old who still has a full time job and receiving a monthly retirement sss benefits. I got a surgery for my gallbladder last 7/20/18. I will be off for 6 weeks. Am I entitled for a SSS disability ?
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for posting. To answer your question, since you are past your full retirement age, you are already receiving the full benefit you can get. Unfortunately, becoming disabled after your full retirement age does not result in any additional benefits. In any case, Social Security disability is only granted when someone will be unable to work for a year or more.

reviews.text: He good
I was born july 18,1954 and I get SSI benefit.When  I can be retired
reviews.ownerResponse: Thanks for posting. To answer your question, if you receive Supplemental Security Income (SSI) disability benefits, then what is supposed to happen is when you turn 62, you will have to apply to Social Security for any early retirement benefit you may be eligible for. If your early retirement benefit is more than the SSI amount ($750 per month for an individual in 2018), then you won't receive SSI anymore. If your early retirement amount is less than $750, then you will still receive SSI, but only enough to bring you up to $750 per month.

reviews.text:
I'm so thankful to have found LaTarria — she was a true miracle for me and my daughter. I had an extremely difficult family law case and had a terrible experience with my first attorney, who was very expensive, but really just took advantage of the danger my daughter and I were in from her father to pump us for fees. In addition, the other parent's attorney was openly breaking the law while I was still seeking counsel. By the time I found LaTarria, I had been put through the wringer and had very little trust left in attorneys.

However, LaTarria was always fair and honest in her pricing, in how she represented herself, and in what she said she could do for me. She was patient and understanding about my anxieties surrounding my case, and she consistently took the time to thoroughly explain my legal options. She is trustworthy and genuinely cares about her clients’ best interests throughout the family court process.

I’m grateful I found her, and I would highly recommend her to anyone looking for an honest and dependable family law attorney with an upfront, affordable, and transparent fee structure.

DO NOT HIRE HER

If you are a woman seeking legal representation in a custody matter, I personally do not recommend Ms. LaTerria. I truly wish I had done more research before hiring her.

It is very important to me that my child has both parents involved in his life. I went through my pregnancy alone and supported my son entirely on my own for the first two years of his life. Despite that, I still allowed his father to be involved. My concerns began when my son was returned to me with a swollen neck and bleeding, and no explanation was provided. From that point forward, I did not allow him to take him, but I made it clear that the father was always welcome to come see his child. After a year of little to no involvement, the father filed for visitation. That is when I hired Ms. LaTerria, a decision I now regret. I explained my situation in detail and provided photographs documenting my child’s injuries. Instead of feeling supported, I felt as though my concerns were minimized and that she was taking the father’s side rather than advocating for me. When I later researched her public posts, I noticed that many of them focused on defending fathers, often stating, “Let that man see them kids.” While I agree that good fathers should absolutely be involved in their children’s lives, every case is unique and should be handled based on its specific facts and circumstances.

There were also several important issues in my case that were not addressed:
•	I requested multiple times that discovery be sent to the father, and it was never done.
•	I requested an in-person appointment, which was never scheduled.
•	As the sole provider for my child, I explained that I cannot miss work and asked for depositions, hearings, and mediation to be scheduled on my days off. My requests were not accommodated.
•	I was not seeking child support; however, I did request reimbursement for the daycare expenses that I solely paid for a year and a half. She did not properly review the supporting documents I provided and instead advised me to settle without receiving any compensation. I attended mediation, and while we agreed to a parenting plan, we did not agree on a specific start date. After mediation, I was told that opposing counsel would be contacted regarding this issue. However, when I later reviewed the documents, a start date had already been included, one I had not agreed to, and it even reflected the incorrect year. I brought this to her attention, but no corrective action was taken. As a result, I felt pressured to begin the parenting plan only days after mediation, even though I was not prepared to do so. Additionally, there were times when I felt spoken to in a raised or dismissive tone. I did not feel that my concerns were fully heard or that my objectives were being strongly advocated for. Regarding fees, I was told that once the retainer was exhausted, I would be contacted to arrange a payment plan. That did not happen. After mediation, I was informed that she would withdraw from representing me if full payment was not made and that final documents would not be filed until payment was received.  She charged me $8,000.00, which is a significant amount for me as a single mother of two children, one of whom has autism, suffers from seizures, and requires ongoing medical care and medication. Despite the financial hardship, I hired her because I care deeply about my son and wanted what was best for him. I needed an attorney as soon as possible, so I moved forward.
To date, I have paid $5,300.00 and am still making payments. I was initially told that the final judgment would be included in the fee; however, that was not honored. Ultimately, I had to discharge her as my attorney. In the end, very little was done in my case beyond what she chose to pursue, rather than what I believed was in my son’s best interest. Overall, I did not feel supported, heard, or properly represented during a very important and sensitive time in my life.
They were very helpful and knowledgably.
Sherer Law firm made this process so simple and stress free!! Thank you to everyone involved!!

reviews.text:
Grateful! I was treated like a person, not a case.

For the past four years, I have been trying to build a relationship with my five-year-old daughter. Unfortunately, the mother and her family have fought me on every end.  It has been painful and exhausting. Last year, I decided to file for a Parenting/Time Sharing plan. I represented myself while the other party hired a lawyer. I couldn't afford one. Unfortunately, the case took a turn and I was left with a bag of questions. When I called Ms. Shere's office, her assistant was so kind and patient as I explained my situation. There was empathy and thoughtfulness on the other end of the line. She was very honest and could not guarantee that Ms. Sherer would be able to get back to me in the time I needed but promised she would try.

No more than two hours later I received a call from Ms. Sherer herself. Not an attorney looking to take a case for money, but someone who was genuine and wanted to understand so that she could provide me with the best advice. I must have called ten lawyers today and she was the first one to give me actionable steps to take (like filing a motion for clarification so I could understand exactly what was said during my hearing) to help my case. I nearly cried when I got off the call. She gave me answers and guidance. She even informed me that I would likely need an appellate attorney should the case move forward and I should prepare for that.

I am grateful for Ms. Sherer and her team. The care, attention, and empathy they exhibited was heartfelt. We need more of it in the world.

Let them help you. You'll never regret it.

- Gabriel Cullens

If that weren't enough, he asked that we call him back if we needed any additional resources. He was extremely gracious with his time at 5:00pm on a Thursday evening. Thank you Mr. Barnhill!

For my son’s entire life, I knew I wanted the best possible legal outcome, that was truly in his best interest. That’s why I chose Mr. Byrd to represent me in my complicated family law case.
I was stressed to the max and didn’t know what to do  and he assured me that everything was going to be handled and he would take care of it. And he did!
He made his self available for all of my questions and never left me out of the loop in what was happening with my case.
As a result, my family got the results we were after.
He’s kind, understanding and patient. And most importantly, he delivers results! I never regretted choosing him as my attorney.

Thank you!
Job well done, very professional

reviews.text: To say navigating us through what was a very difficult and unique probate situation would be an understatement.  Yet, Johnnie Byrd did just that in a very helpful and professional way.  We would highly recommend him to any family facing the need for an estate/probate lawyer.
reviews.ownerResponse: It was a pleasure to work with you to navigate the frustrations of probate and bring this matter to a successful conclusion. Thanks again for the kind words…

reviews.text: So thankful that my Dad had Mr. Byrd create living will and family trust documents a few years ago.  My Dad passed suddenly this year, and those documents made everything so much easier during these difficult times. Mr. Bryd's advice on handling family assets to Dad and myself has also been invaluable.

I utilized Mr. Johnnie Byrd for a child support recalculation and parenting time modification, and he really took the time understand the complexities of the issue, to ensure that my best interest were first and foremost.  He won't tell you what you want to hear, instead he'll tell you what you need to know and I greatly appreciate his professionalism and guidance throughout out the entire process.

If anything comes up again Johnnie Byrd will be the first person I call, and I would HIGHLY recommend. you do the same.

Thanks Johnnie!

There is no way to win the dispute it is completely rigged. I recommend that nobody use this firm.  I am telling you this guy has got to be the most dishonest person you could meet. I laughed when I saw the comment below. Completely opposite this guy represents a large company that provided terrible service and in the end takes food out of the mouth of a small business family to pad his pocket. Absolutely disgusting. Negative experience with a contested guardianship. Attorney made no attempt to question false information presented from opposing counsel during a magiitrate's hearing. Opposing counsel was not put under oath and this attorney took their hearsay comments as literal truth, when it wasnt.   I felt like he was working for the opposition and not for me. I eventually completed the process through a different attorney, who was more experienced in contested guardianships. This attorney may be good with other matters, not with contested guardianships.

If you have ever felt like your business was being trampled and you weren't even sure you could defend yourself - Call John Gardner. If you have previously gotten poor representation and think all lawyers stink - Call John Gardner.  We used other attorneys in the past and it just felt like they dragged their feet to get all they could from us and we would never win.  But that changed about 20 years ago. John is a fighter. He is a champion for the little guy.  He is AMAZING in court.  He lives for this.  You can see he really likes what he does.  He has helped us protect our business and we are so grateful we found him.  If you are looking for a small business or property lawyer - He IS your man!!!

In a field where the occupation is often the punch line, this gentleman is no joke. It is rare to find a person willing to fight for an underdog that has few resources, but is in need of representation for what is morally and fundamentally right. John treated me with dignity, and fought my case with all his passion. I could never "Thank you" enough for what John has done for me at that time.
in my opinion anyone representing unifirst has to be as dishonest as they are
Awesome attorney and I know you don't usually associate the two words in the same sentence. John is well known in the community and had his clients backs with years of experience.

reviews.text: To say Derek is amazing is an absolute understatement. He is the best defense attorney around. He asks for honesty from you and there is absolutely no bs with him. Many people think poorly about defense attorney's, until they are put in a situation where they did absolutely nothing wrong and they need someone to prove that with FACTS. HIGHLY RECOMMEND!!!!!!! I would give him TEN stars if I was able to!

Ever since we moved to Florida, we’ve run into multiple problems with contractors who have worked on our house. David, Derek, and the team at Matthews Law have helped my family and me throughout these ordeals.

They’ve been incredibly understanding and never nickel-and-dimed us for their time. Working with them has been a pleasure, even under less-than-ideal circumstances.

I highly recommend Matthews Law & Associates to anyone in need of legal help or advice.
Mr. Matthews genuinely cares and stays available throughout the entire process. He’s professional, knowledgeable, and provides clear guidance to help you achieve your goals.
David reacted quickly and handled our matter professionally with our best interest in mind. Highly recommended.

Derek took a holistic view of my case and showed empathy with my concerns. He helped me understand the complex world of family law and cleared a path for my expectations. Through the process Derek and Denise were always ready to answer any question I had and took every step to ensure I was always up to date on my case. They showed empathy and made me feel like I was heard. After 3 months with Derek I had the agreement I never thought I would get. Words can’t express how thankful I am for everything Matthew’s Law & Associates did for me. They took what I thought was the impossible and made it possible. Thank you again! If you feel like your case is stuck in the mud with no end in sight, I highly recommend giving this team a call. You won’t regret it.

I would recommend retaining him for your legal needs.

I can’t say enough good things about Matthew Law & Associates. After my car accident, I was overwhelmed and unsure of what to do next. From the very first call, they took the weight off my shoulders. Their team was incredibly professional, responsive, and truly cared about my well-being.

They guided me through every step of the process and made sure I understood what was happening. Most importantly — they secured a great settlement for me, and much faster than I expected. I always felt like I was in good hands, and they truly went above and beyond to make sure I was taken care of.

If you’re looking for a law firm that gets results and treats you like a priority, I highly recommend Matthew Law & Associates.

reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much for your kind words and recommendation! At Carman & Finegan, P.A., we’re honored to have helped you through such a difficult time. Our goal as a trusted personal injury law firm in Brandon is to treat every client like family while providing strong, straightforward legal guidance. We’re so glad you felt supported every step of the way.

reviews.text:
Absolutely incredible experience with this firm. From the first moment I spoke to the receptionist to the final day of wrapping everything up, they brought ease and care to the entire process. I felt like I was part of the family and they cared for me beyond measure. It was about so much more than the actual litigation…they went above and beyond the call of duty and handled something that wasn’t even part of my case. One Friday night when time was of the essence, I was given someone’s cell number so that I could reach out over the weekend. On top of everything else, my insurance wouldn’t agree to finish fixing my car, and Mike and Alan took care of it all.  Here I am calling from a playground crying and they reassured me that my kids would be in a safe car soon…this isn’t even something that they have to handle but they did. It was like calling my brother to help me out.

They took a really awful life experience and brought so much comfort throughout the process. Their level of expertise in their field was incredible…while I mostly worked with Mike, every single person was at one point involved. Thank you again for bringing me so much peace…much love to you all! -Emily

Mike Finegan represented me through two car accidents that occurred, where the cases overlapped each other.  In 2019 I was left with permanent injuries, and a totaled vehicle. Mr. Finegan and his team helped me through every step of the process. Funds for a vehicle were recovered expeditiously. Unfortunately, this was at a time where I was just starting trade school which is full time hours, while working a job.  It greatly affected my ability to work in two physically demanding environments. Fast forward, I had to move back to my hometown due to Covid-19, and his team made sure I was able to receive care as everything re-opened. Due to the nature of trade school, when you miss hours/make up hours this can accrue an additional expense. Upon graduating he helped me navigate this with school admin, and I was able to work out an exemption. As this case was coming to a close I was in another car accident. Once again, a totaled vehicle, and worsening symptoms, this time at the start of my career. Mike was very realistic with what to expect since this was a 2nd accident. Navigating 2 car accidents and  treatment for pain (especially in your early 20’s) is not for the faint of heart, but Mike and his team truly put my mind at ease. They answered every question I had, were thorough about every step of the process, and made sure I was confident with every decision I had to make. I felt that I received the care you would get if you were a family member. The last 5 years of my life were incredibly challenging, but I am beyond thankful for the care I received working with Mike and his team. I am happy with the result of how both cases ended, and would recommend anyone going through a personal injury case to choose MIke.

10 out of 10!  I consider myself a very confident person however, when shaken mentally and injured  physically in an accident AND feeling vulnerable against an insurance company that I knew I could not trust- I realized I needed help. Michael has a very sharp and defined skillset that produced results FAR beyond what the insurance company initially offered me just 72 hours after the accident. Michael was exactly what was needed for me to handle the insurance company and their games. I am specifically impressed and appreciative of his patience to listen, answer all of my questions directly and navigate me through his process of taking care of his clients with ease. If you hire Michael- you get Michael- He took every call and if he wasn't available at the moment called me back promptly at first opportunity. His attention to detail and memory recall is also very impressive- nothing falls through the cracks with him. Michael has earned this review for his EXCELLENT RESULTS but also for the way he listened, provided the personal attention that I expected with all the answers I needed. Small town lawyer attention with BIG City results!
Michael went above and beyond on my case. I am very happy with the results.
reviews.ownerResponse: We really appreciate your review! Our team is glad to hear that you were satisfied with our legal services.

reviews.text:
This is an outstanding law firm. I was injured due to being rear-ended and was left with a head injury and back pains.  I was recommended by a family friend. I was hurt and looking for guidance.

Mr. Finnegan listened to me and did not assume. During the legal process, Mr. Finnegan was transparent and honest- never over promising.

I was able to get my treatment to return to being functional. The whole way, Mr. Finnegan was available to answer any question that I came up with.

I hope that I never get into an accident, however if I do, I know Mr. Finnegan will be the first call that I make to help guide me to the most achievable solution.

I was unfortunately in a car accident and got recommended to Michael for my case. Immediately upon meeting him and his PA Sherry I felt not only heard and comfortable but at ease that my case would be properly take care of. They have showed nothing but compassion through out the whole 3yr process it took for my case. They will make you feel at home with calls to check on your well being and any concerns that you may have. Wonderful people and an experience that I and forever grateful for.
I was treated with such respect.  I appreciated everything your team has done for me.  Thanking you is not enough .  I would highly recommend your company highly
When in doubt, seek legal counsel from this talented law firm. Their drive, professionalism, and personal integrity have earned them my highest praise.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you, Ronnie, for the opportunity to represent you, and thank you for the kind words. It was a pleasure to represent you.

reviews.text: This firm has handled both of my personal injury cases after car accidents and I could not be more pleased. Mike Finegan and the team spent a lot of time with me in the beginning to help me understand all of my options. They have a great referral network of chiropractors and pain management clinics that did wonders to help me recover from my injuries. They also helped me reduce my out of pocket medical costs from my hospital visits and treatments following the accidents. They kept me will informed through every step of the legal process- while also caring about by wellness and recovery. I HIGHLY recommend this firm for anyone involved in a personal injury case- you'll be in really good hands.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you, Lauren! It was an honor representing you, and we thank you for the opportunity to assist.
Thank you, Jason!

reviews.text: I’m not one to leave reviews, but the personal care and commitment I received from Mr. Finnegan was above and beyond anything expected. They took my personal injury case when some of the bigger names wouldn’t. In fact, the mighty Morgan and Morgan told me there “wasn’t enough money in my case for them to take it”.  I wasn’t seeking financial compensation, I just wanted help navigating medical care and insurance companies (and 7 months getting my car repaired). Mr. Finnegan was there every step of the way. He took care of all the details and really is an expert on his field. This is a top-notch practice!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much, Bill, for your praise and your trust in our firm.  It was an honor fighting for you.

reviews.text: I retained Michael Finegan for a relatively minor accident where the other driver wasn't insured. He explained my options thoroughly,  and filed for reimbursement for my minor injuries through my auto insurance. When they failed to respond within the time allowed by law, Michael filed suit against Geico. Michael doggedly pursued the auto insurer and the company was complelled to admit they had acted in bad faith. The financial results were far beyond my expectations! Mr. Finnegan personifies the best of personal injury law and advocacy!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much, Karen!  It was an honor representing you, and thank you again for your trust in our firm.

reviews.text: I would like to sincerely thank everyone at Carman, Bevington, and Finegan.  I had the privilege of working with Mr. Finegan throughout my process.  Michael couldn’t have been anymore professional than he was.  Although it was a lengthy process, Michael and his team were always communicative and anytime I needed anything, they were a phone call or email away.  I would most definitely recommend Michael and/or anyone else at Carman, Bevington, & Finegan!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you, Will, for the kind words, for the opportunity to assist, and for your trust in our firm.  It was a pleasure representing you!
Thank you, Jacob!

I want to thank the team at Carman,  Bevington & Finegan Law Firm, especially Attorney Michael Finegan, he was absolutely amazing. Every person working there was professional, warm, helpful, patient, & made me feel comfortable & important. Michael in particular went above & beyond by not only being a dynamite attorney, who’s extremely knowledgeable in personal injury but also a very thoughtful counselor listening to my anxieties & offering words of advice & comfort. He fought vigilantly on my behalf through out the case, as I was overwhelmed & exhausted from dealing with my permanent injuries from the accident. I could not have had a better experience. I am grateful for his hard work to make a traumatic and daunting experience less of a burden on me and to achieve a greater outcome than I could have ever imagined. I just can’t thank Michael Finegan enough.”
After a careless driver hit the gas instead of their breaks & smashed me between my suv rear end & the careless driver suv rear end. Michael Finegan Esq., looked the case over, took it & told me exactly what would happen, what to expect, & approximately how long it would take. All turned out to be 100% right-on, & I like honesty. Michael’s  follow up was excellent & I was truly 100% satisfied with every aspect of the way the case was followed. I received nearly all the maximum allowable compensation I could have from both insurance companies. I’m 100% satisfied with Michael Finegan’s excellent representation, I highly recommend him.

Sharon

This is the worst attorney that you’ll ever have if you’re a minority please don’t trust these people they play with your money I had a lawsuit against a white person and they took their favor because they were a nurse and this lady hit me from the back driving  45 miles an hour this is the worst attorney they’ve had my case for at least six months and they haven’t done anything I got a broken foot and they refused to fix it so instead of fixing my foot they gave the case away worse attorney worst experience don’t ever trust these attorneys

reviews.text: This is the worst attorney that I have ever had encounters with if you have a lawsuit or accident these attorneys drop the ball they’re too busy on vacation I had a broken foot and because my foot was broke they terminated my case because they didn’t have the right paperwork if you are a minority I suggest you keep your business out of Brandon and out of Michael Finnegan‘s hands the worst attorney he only caters to a certain group and if you are a minority I don’t think you’re in that group there’s something definitely wrong with this law firm I would definitely check the reviews to make sure this is the person or the company you wanna deal with

As a 20 year military vet and working with many agencies over my time.  This firm represents all the same values we live by.  I unfortunately had to work with Mike twice due to peoples negligence.  Mike is a trusting, straightforward, hardworking, and a straight shooter.  To top it all off he knows his line of work and is amazing at it!... The excellent work by Michael Finegan and Paralegal Sherie Jirinec was always professional, knowledgeable, helpful and friendly. Michael's "rugged determination" for the best results for me was evident from the first. Should the need arise, Carmen and Bevington is your best choice..

I would highly recommend anybody looking for an attorney to come here, if you want someone that will take the time to get to know you and work with you to great the best results for you.
Vanessa and Lynn made a rough situation as smooth as possible. I could not have had a better experience with such a wonderful team.  I would definitely recommend this office.

Professionalism, Responsiveness, Value
An amazing law firm! Mr Finnegan and Ms Sherie are the best people you could every meet. They always made me feel comfortable and also caring for my well-being, I really appreciate that. Mr Finnegan is very loyal kind and just a very nice young man. I am grateful he took the time to explain everything and I truly believe in him. He worked really hard on my case and he kept me updated every step of the way. He always made time to discuss questions or concerns, no matter how minor or insignificant! His assistant Sherie was very reliable and helpful. She always responded promptly to all my questions! I’m Truly grateful to God for this  firm Mr Finnegan and Ms Sherie you’ll are the BEST!!!Great firm! Highly Highly recommend! That are the REAL DEAL!!! Thank the Lord!!!🙌🏿🙌🏿

Despite never imagining being in a car accident with injury at 30 years old and having to go thru a lawsuit, Carman and Bevington made the experience as painless as possible. They were very caring/understanding, far from pushy, and their efforts could be seen and felt while working on my case. I truly felt I was part of a “family” that was all working together to get to one common goal. Sherie was the sweetest woman to chat with, always getting excited to hear my voice on the other end of phone and asking how I was doing (it felt like I was chatting with my mom in a way). She kept me up to date on what was needed from me, as well as what was going on every step of the process. Mike Finegan felt like my big brother fighting a battle for me. His knowledge and confidence gave me a sense of trust and peace to be able to go thru the 7-8 months without having to worry the outcome of my lawsuit. Allen Carman even took the time to work on my case, showing that their organization wasn’t too big and all hands were going to be on deck to fight with/for me. I was able to focus on my health and getting back to a somewhat “normal” life, while they worked behind the scenes. Though I wish I never had been rear ended, I am thrilled with the outcome of my case. I would recommend this team to anyone and will not hesitate in the future to reach out to them if need. (I actually was rear ended several weeks after my lawsuit was settled. The first person I called was the cops, with the second call not being to my family, but to Carman and Bevington.)
Best n the business!

An amazing law firm! Mr Finnegan worked really hard on my case and he kept me updated every step of the way. He always made time to discuss questions or concerns, no matter how minor or insignificant! His assistant Sherie was very reliable and helpful.She always responded promptly to all my questions! Great firm! Highly recommend!

If you want a law firm where you actually talk to your lawyer instead of a paralegal this is the firm for you. They did a awesome job handling my case and kept me up to date on what was happening with my case
Excellent experience from beginning to end. 100% recommended
Thank you, lawyer Anasol, and your team for your professionalism. 100% recommended. We are very satisfied. Thank you, thank you.

Very professional and friendly. You can easily understand everything she explains regarding your situation. Highly recommended!

I recommend attorney Anasol Roldán. She helped me obtain my work permit and now I have my residency. I highly recommend her; she's a very good lawyer and excellent at helping people. Thanks to her, I am now a resident.

reviews.text:
I hired The Law Offices of Stephen K. Hachey to help resolve a co-ownership dispute involving jointly owned property in Florida, and their guidance through pre-suit mediation made all the difference!  Instead of filing a partition lawsuit, Stephen helped us negotiate a fair resolution that saved significant time, legal fees, and above all stress.  It wasn’t just him; it was his whole team.  Everybody I spoke to was amazing at listening and helped to de-escalate a very emotionally fueled situation for me.

He clearly explained my rights under Florida property law, prepared me for mediation, and used a strategic approach that led to a practical settlement everyone could live with. If you’re dealing with inherited property, a co-owner dispute, or want to avoid a partition lawsuit through mediation, I highly recommend The Law Offices of Stephen K. Hachey. Professional, efficient, and results-driven from start to finish.  I highly recommend mediation as well.  This was a godsend.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Patricia,
Thank you for your thoughtful review and for trusting The Law Offices of Stephen K. Hachey to help resolve your co-ownership dispute. We’re very glad that our pre-suit mediation strategy helped you reach a fair settlement while avoiding the time, expense, and stress of a partition lawsuit.

Co-owner and inherited property disputes can be emotionally challenging, so our goal is always to combine clear guidance under Florida property law with practical negotiation strategies that move cases toward resolution whenever possible. We appreciate you recognizing the effort of our entire team — communication and de-escalation are a big part of achieving successful outcomes in these matters.

If you or someone you know is facing a jointly owned property dispute, inherited property issue, or considering mediation to avoid a partition action in Florida, we’re always here to help. Thank you again for your recommendation — it truly means a great deal to our firm.

reviews.text:
Ana and Stephen Hachey are the best!
Subject:  Landlord/Tenant
On 05-15-2020, I had tenants who were not paying their rent.  Over the weekend, I did a quick Google search, and found Stephen K. Hachey located near me.  His website was easy to navigate and provided a way for me to send him an email.  He responded to my email very quickly, even on a Saturday!  I explained my situation to him and he advised that he would have his staff contact me on Monday to proceed.  It gave me such peace of mind to know that I was on the road to being able to address the situation.
On Monday, Ana contacted me.  I explained my situation to her again and we discussed my options and an action plan to properly deal with my tenant situation.  A 3-Day Notice was posted with Attorney Hachey's contact information at the bottom.  Within a short period of time, the tenants contacted Attorney Hachey's Office.  After speaking with them, my tenants had a complete turnaround in attitude.  I soon received text messages from my tenants showing photo copies of the deposit slips where they had paid their rent, paid the late fees, paid up their late water bills, etc.  They eagerly wanted to hear back from me that I had received and verified that they had made payment.  They could not say enough nice things to me to make me happy!  They vacated the property on the agreed upon date and time and left the property in good enough condition to get their security deposit back.
I can't say enough good things about Ana and Attorney Stephen Hachey.  They are miracle workers!  I will definitely be reaching out to them for any future landlord/tenant issues and I highly recommend them to anyone needing to deal with landlord/tenant issues!!!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much for sharing your great experience online! We've enjoyed working with you as well!

I highly recommend Mickey Keenan, P.A.

Mickey and his entire team’s communication is fantastic—open, direct, and clear. Updates were provided proactively, and my inquiries were always answered in a timely manner.

The entire team is to the point, efficient, and yet friendly and personable. Very genuine professionals all around! I wouldn’t want to work with any team that doesn’t operate with this attitude and set of values. This is the standard I will expect from any legal team going forward.

The handling of the entire process was highly satisfactory. It was evident my case was in the right hands, and I felt well looked after throughout.

If my best friend were to ask, and they were able to take the case, I would recommend them without hesitation.

reviews.text: Amazinggggg lawyers at this firm! They took my case in the middle of a representation transition away from another FL firm & got to work immediately! We didn’t  even have to go to trial , which would’ve delayed our settlement another year. I was happy to know that the lawyers working on my case had ample amount of experience with insurance companies. Ted, my primary lawyer, was always easy to reach when I needed answers to in-depth questions that Sebastian was happy to pass along! Sebastian was very helpful as well, as he was working closely with me as a paralegal & was very attentive to my case. Mickey spoke with me personally regarding an issue with a medical provider I saw & did his due diligence with reducing my medical bills so I was able to receive a very fair chunk of such a small policy limit. Noah & Joseph were very efficient with closing out my case & facilitating the release of funds! No matter the size of your case, this firm handles your injury claims with professionalism and efficiency! Would highly recommend hiring them, and I hope that I never need to again, although it’s relieving to know they will always be on my speed dial for unanticipated FL auto injury represention!

reviews.text: Very disappointed in the direction we ended up going. Made a payment plan with them and it was explained that they would not file until everything was paid up front. I asked this question twice to the females I spoke to. I got all the information and paperwork they asked for in a timely matter. Didn’t get an update and had to deal with an AI assistant who couldn’t help out or spell the name correctly. After emailing them they finally called me and said yes we will review the paperwork. Then I got an email saying they won’t move forward until they have full payment. That threw up a red flag as dishonesty isn’t the best way to gain someone’s trust. I had a family member use them who recommended them and also mentioned to me their fees were never so high. Nights of getting all the paperwork organized to be lied to.
reviews.ownerResponse: Hi Donny. I'm a little confused by your review. In the first sentence you said we explained to you that the case would not be filed until you paid the fees in full and that was consistent with the call the team made to you reiterating that. I think that we explained that to you in both communications. I would love to speak to you about this further to see if maybe there was a breakdown in process. I will give you call tomorrow.

reviews.text: We used The Golden Law Group to file a Chapter 7 bankruptcy. The process was fairly easy, and they did their job. We also appreciated the payment plan they offer. However, don't expect much more from them after that. On the first call, we were told they would be sending information about the process and what to expect, as we have never been through anything like this before. Never received anything after numerous calls. Also, a couple of times we would call to ask a question before even filing, and we were told someone would call us back.  Every time, someone different answered the phone, and they couldn't help us. On 3 separate occasions, nobody ever returned our calls. One time, they did return our call, but it was a week and a half later. We met with our bankruptcy lawyer once before our court date about the case. After that, we only spoke to him once, during the court hearing, when he said hi and said he'd call us later that afternoon. Which he never did. Not to mention, we did not receive any information on what to do next or any guidance. A few months after the discharge, we were still receiving calls from debt collectors. We called Golden Law Group to inform them, and again, they said they'd have someone call us, and again, nobody ever did. Here we are, a year and a month after the bankruptcy discharge, and we are still getting calls from debt collectors. We have reported the harassing phone calls to the Golden Law Group on 3 separate occasions, and we still cannot get anyone to help. We have left numerous messages with different people answering the phone, and still nothing. Last call was on Jan 26th, still waiting. If you're looking for someone to just file and not provide anything else, yeah, I would recommend Golden Law Group. But if you're expecting good customer service or any help beyond the filing, I'd find somewhere else.
reviews.ownerResponse: Greg, Thank you for your honest assessment of our firm. It appears that we did not meet your expectations in the area of communication. That is not acceptable to me. I am very sorry that we feel like we haven't been there to support you properly through the process. That is not the way we usually do business. I know this isn't good enough to make up for the months that have passed but I am definitely going to reach out to you today to see if there is anything more you need or that we can do to help you. You definitely should not be receiving collection calls at this point. Once again, I am sorry that we appear to have dropped the ball here and I will do what I can to make it up to you.

They didn't just explain the process; they illuminated it, breaking down complex legal jargon into clear, actionable steps, ensuring I felt empowered to make informed decisions.

Golden Law Group's strategic expertise and unwavering dedication were instrumental in securing the most favorable resolution for my case. They didn't just guide me; they advocated fiercely on my behalf, transforming a potentially overwhelming ordeal into a streamlined and successful process.

For anyone navigating the turbulent waters of financial hardship, I offer my strongest recommendation: Golden Law Group. Their commitment to professionalism, coupled with their profound legal acumen and genuine client care, sets them apart. If you're seeking a bankruptcy attorney who will prioritize your best interests, Golden Law Group is the definitive choice."

At this point, we’ve found our attorney. I highly recommend him to anyone looking for professionalism, compassion, and quality legal support.

I am a retired New Jersey native, who have took permanent residency here in Florida in 2014.  Since being in Florida, approximately three (3) years of this time.  I've been employed as a Medical Courier.  I had gotten very excited, when I finally landed this position.  This position allowed me the opportunity to learn the different highways, roads and my way period around the unfamiliar State of Florida.  I don't know about anyone else, but it's very scary trying to find your way around.  Especially, in a new place or a whole another State for that matter.  Now, that I've become an experienced Courier navigating through many different areas of Florida.  Let me share.....  Throughout my travels, I've definitely observed and witnessed many, many, many motor vehicle accidents here.  In fact, I have been personally involved in two (2) motor vehicle rear end accidents all in one (1) year.  And both were approximately six (6) months apart of each other.  Because of these incidences, I did sustain some injures.  Therefore, I wanted to seek some type of legal representation or advice relating to this.

In my search and travels for some legal representation or advice.  I remembered observing in passing this particular Law Office every morning on my way to work.  However, one day I decided to stop and go inside to inquire about my accident.  During this time, I had the pleasure of meeting, deciding and retaining Attorney Marla E. Chavernay.

Keep in mind, this Law Office isn't your over the top, extravagant, TV advertising "BIG" Law Firm.

What struck and got me about this Law Office!  From the time I entered inside.  Everyone there was so warm, receptive and welcoming.  Attorney Chavernay and Staff are very attentive to your needs.  They all are caring, understanding, thorough, diligent, hardworking, trustworthy, honest, to the point, fair, kind, open-hearted, passionate etc.  There isn't enough good things I could not say about this Law Office.  Attorney Marla E. Chavernay and Staff (Melissa, Yailene etc.) are all fantastic.  I have been a client of theirs for approximately three (3) now.

I would like to add.  Now a days, it's very hard to find or put your trust in someone or some organization that is willing to do the right thing by you or for you genuinely.  But, I can truly say.  I was fortunate, lucky and blessed to decide to stop in their office that day.  The best decision I could have made for myself.  Trusting my instincts and trusting in the Law Office of Marla E. Chavernay and her Staff.

Very beautiful people you can believe in.  For any reason this Law Office could not assist you with a matter.  Trust and believe, they will be sure and attempt to steer you in the right direction without prejudice for any further legal support.  I would like to conclude by stating, "The Law Office of Marla E. Chavernay are great".  "I appreciate and love these guys for all that they do".  "If they could do right by me, they surely will do right by you".  "Believe in them, give them a try and let the results speak for themselves...….

I was recommended this law office by a co-worker of mine and needless to stay, our attorney, Ms. Chavernay and her secretary, Yailene, provided us excellent quality service.  They worked hard and fast, always keeping us abreast of what was going on in our situation, and helped us to a resolution that my daughter and I could not be happier about.  We are forever indebted and grateful for their efforts, their professionalism, and their willingness to help-- as they never once wavered in communicating with us about what was going on with our case.  I would HIGHLY recommend this law office for anyone involved in a car accident.  You won't be disappointed.  Ms. Chavernay will do everything in her power to help a person. She is a an attorney with integrity and we give this recommendation the highest satisfaction!  It was a win-win resolution for all of us.  Thank you ever so much!

reviews.text: Life these days is difficult to navigate, same is true with trusting an individual to look out for your best interest after an accident. Daily we are bombarded with radio and TV advertisements about why you should hire us and how we are for the people. Why be only a number, why settle and work with a law firm who will never invest or listen to you. Don’t be a number, Brian and Ben are superb litigators that will first build your trust by listening and sharing there experiences and then work diligently on your case to maximize the outcome. I never felt out of touch with Brian or Ben, both are available by phone or text and delivered with a six figure settlement. I was always updated on the status and what to expect. No surprises!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much for the great review. We are happy we could get such a great result for you with your case.

reviews.text: I had a car accident in May 2020 and they came recommend to me. Going with them waa the best choice I made. They did everything they could and it was such a simple process working with them. Always quick to respond to emails/phone calls at any time about any questions or concerns. We were able to settle without even going to court. I could not recommend them enough!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your trust in representing you John. It was a pleasure working with you on your case.

reviews.text: Ben represented me in 2019 regarding a car crash I was in. He did a great job for me in resolving my case and always kept in close communication with me so I knew what was going on. Dealing with the accident and lawsuit was simple with his help and he got a great recovery for me.
Jim handled a personal injury case for me recently and did an amazing job, Highly recommend this firm!
He is an Amazing person who really cares about you. I am very Blessed to have him in my life.

Attorney Jim, as I call him, is very results driven, informative, prompt with responses and a pleasure to work with. My whole process from beginning to end was smooth and I had a great comfort level working with him. He gets the job done and I would highly recommend him.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you very much, Elaine!

reviews.text: James was recommended by one of my friend. I am from Europe and all of my family members live outside of US. The car accident was not my fault, so it was hard to accept, it could happen. To deal with everything in my life was difficult being a single Mom with a special needs son. When I decided to hire an attorney, I knew in my heart James will be the best for me. I was hopeless and scared when we started our journey together. From the first minute and even now, I felt like he is not just my attorney who works for getting paid, he was my friend and family in the same time. He made out of my case the best. I will be always thankful and grateful for him and also for his staff. Do not hesitate if you need an attorney, He would be your best choice as well!!!!
reviews.ownerResponse: Very kind and it was a pleasure representing you, Gabriella!
Thank you!

reviews.text: Having moved to FL less than 2 yrs ago, i didnt know traffic accident report requirements & was charged with a police violation despite pulling over voluntarily and seeing 0 damage.  Mr Guarnieri was very detailed in evaluating the case and explaining p e. outcomes.  No hard sell, and the rate if he were to take the case laid out upfront.  He eventually got the charge dismissed altogether.  I highly recommend his services.  I'm age 50, and this was my best attorney experience ever!
reviews.ownerResponse: Happy to help!
Thank you so much!  Client reviews are my best advertising!

reviews.text: Highly recomended
reviews.ownerResponse: Much appreciated-- thank you!
Thank you very much!

reviews.text: Can't find a better atty and paralegal duo...top notch

reviews.ownerResponse: I am sorry. I do not know who you are or why you would leave a negative review. I have no record of communication from you or you seeking services at the Firm. Could you provide some specifics? Thanks.

reviews.text: Sean is very professional, trustworthy, knowledgeable, and effectively communicates.  I highly recommend his law firm for litigation matters.

I had some business related questions that Sean helped me answer. His firm was professional, courteous and responsive. They were extremely helpful in bringing my situation to a resolution and I can not recommend them enough!

I called this attorney because he had a 4.9 star rating and a broad legal specialty. The paralegal answered the phone and I explained my matter. The matter involved a tree and my fence which I'm sure is very common. After the paralegal made me feel stupid for even calling she put me on hold to I assume paraphrase my story to the lawyer. When she returned she told me that the lawyer's case load was full and he wasn't taking on any new case. What really happened was that I was a waste of time for the lawyer and he couldn't be bothered with my case. After I asked if I could talk to the lawyer, the paralegal hesitated and said he was on the phone. Do not go to this guy unless you have a big money case because he doesn't like being bothered by the common folk.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Thanks for your input. As an attorney, I am constrained by the Rules Regulating The Florida Bar from responding in detail, but I will simply state that it is my belief that the post presents neither a fair nor accurate picture of you inquiry this week to the Firm.

The Firm is unable, unfortunately, to assist with each and every call that the firm receives on a daily basis because of capacity constraints. While the Firm is unable to assist you, we nonetheless wish you the best of success with your particular matter.

reviews.text: Very helpful very knowledgeable gave me good advice and saved me a ton of money highly recommend

I have been working with Sean and a number of his satisfied clients for over a year and I can offer a testimonial that is rare in the legal world.  Sean and his team returns phone calls and makes you feel as if you are his only client.  What a concept!  Plus, Sean is "aggressively smart."  He lets his knowledge be the hammer, not bravado.  I've seen it work and it beats "cocky" every time.  I would never want to be opposite Sean in any conflict!

Sean and his team will delve into your situation meticulously. They express super concern for every case and work relentlessly by applying diligent dedication by following through to fruition and beyond. I strongly recommend his services if you are looking for representation that works and obtains results!
As a contractor who occasionally needs legal advise I wouldn't look anywhere else.  His experience and knowledge are second to non.  Give him a call!
Called Sean and told him I needed to quit claim the deed to my house.  In 48 hours he was getting it done.  Talking about a stress reliever!

A family member of mine was involved with a accident and a friend referred us to Sean. The experience was much different than they have experienced before with "BIG Chain" attorneys. Sean was knowledgeable , persistent, trustworthy. He and  his parralegal team who was a pleasure to work with. I would highly recommend Sean Cox for all your legal matters.
Sean is passionate about helping his clients and very knowledgeable. Highly recommend giving him a call for any legal matters!
Sean Cox and his staff handled my case efficiently and professionally! Thank you!

In my business, I occasionally have to battle large insurance companies. As a small businessman, it's great to have a professional like Sean in my corner. He's experience and counseling have been invaluable. I have no reservations about referring him to my clients or peers.

Attorney Cox and his paralegal are amazing !! They remained professional, honest and meticulous in their work. Due to their honesty and diligence, they were able to get our bogus HOA charges rescinded. Will be using them again and I recommend them HIGHLY !
He's my go to for any legal advice.
Knowledgeable, compassionate, experienced, tenacious and gets the results!
Sean is extremely knowlageble and provides excellent services.
I have used Sean in a Personal Injury case and was very satisfied with the results.  I also refer him to friends.  I would highly recommend Cox Law PLLC is you have been in a car accident.

Cox Law PLLC, is a champion law firm for the people that they represent. Sean Patrick Cox's practice has served his constituents with earnestness in every fight for justice. He is a "champions" for the people he represents. When you need a champion lawyer on your side look no further than Cox Law because Sean Patrick Cox is a champion and he obtains results.
Experienced and ready to help in any situation. Great guy, treats you like family. Highly recommended!
Honest and Trustworthy.

Not really sure about the "small fish" review but I honestly didn't even have a case due to no one was injured and Sean and Vanessa worked on my behalf anyways and I was fully compensated for my damages. Not to mention since I wasn't hurt there was no momey in it for him!
I refer new entrepreneurs to Sean for set up of the legal aspect of securing their assets!  Very easy to work with.  Thank you for all your help Sean!
Top Notch attorney. He is honest, smart, and will fight for you.  Thank you, Mr. Cox.  I highly recommend this attorney to anyone in the Tampa Bay Area.

I was injured by a negligent driver in Nov 2015 and found Attorney Cox via a friends recommendation. He and his assistant Vanessa were quick to respond to my emails and we are now wrapping up the case with a settlement that was in the range Sean told me to expect and one that makes me happy with the end result. Just be patient as it takes time to treat for your injuries and negotiate the settlement. We wrapped this up in 6-7 months, YMMV

I can't thank Cox Law enough for the outstanding service. Seans knowledge of the legal system is flawless and his friendly staff goes above and beyond.

If you are looking for a responsible law firm that will handle your case in a trustworthy, responsible manner with firm results, Cox Law is your only option... Period!

I strongly recommend Cox Law, PLLC to anyone seeking legal representation. I turned to Cox Law because I knew I needed legal assistance with my case. In retrospect I simply did not know how much help I really needed. I had an extremely complicated case and, although my experience was a difficult and arduous process, I can't imagine getting through this without Attorney Cox and his office.

My association with Mr. Cox was a blessing and the outcome of my case could not have been better. Attorney Cox is tremendous at managing client expectations and in doing so he displays exceptional experience. In addition he is quite affable. I found every encounter and communication with Mr. Cox to be professional and informative. He is skilled, approachable and extremely attentive and responsive. I never had to actively seek an answer or update throughout this difficult process. Attorney Cox is very proactive and skilled at articulating the law and legal process in an understandable manner. I did not once have to ask what was going to happen next with my difficult case.

Cox Law, PLLC. has an invaluable asset in Attorney Cox's paralegal, Ms. Salazar. Like Mr. Cox, she is extremely responsive and I have no doubt Ms. Salazar's attentiveness, knowledge and organization contributed greatly to the positive outcome of my case. She is a delight to interact with. I will be forever grateful for my representation by Cox Law, PLLC. and I personally felt cared about. This is an experienced, professional and attentive law practice and anyone in need of legal representation in a difficult situation should consider no other practice than Cox Law, PLLC.
